truth.author: I W
truth.text: Loved the black honey flat white. It’s a very smooth blend of Ethiopian and Honduran beans, and the best part is you can buy a bag of the beans to take home. The avocado toast was super tasty, too. Our server was attentive and friendly. Highly recommend!

truth.author: Waleed Alshehri
truth.text: Came from Saudi Arabia to visit Truth Coffee Roasting – it’s easy to see why it’s considered one of the best coffee shops in the world. The coffee is outstanding: perfectly roasted, rich and balanced. Pastries are fresh and delicious, the staff are exceptionally warm and welcoming, and the steampunk decor is truly unique.

truth.author: Błażej Kowol
truth.text: A café with a unique steampunk-style atmosphere. The coffee was very good, and in such a distinctive setting, it tasted even better. The baked goods were also excellent, although the toast could have been a bit less well done. Still, a fantastic place and definitely worth visiting in Cape Town. 8,5/10

kloof.author: Alena Paulavets
kloof.text: Came by recommendation of my friend, and fell in love with this place! Such a cosy atmosphere, beautiful seating and amazing lighting. Food is delicious!!! Meat is so tender. Savoured every bite. Service is outstanding. Sasha made me feel so welcomed. Girls dressed up so stylish! Very good value for the money.

kloof.author: n0aa
kloof.text: An amazing experience and meal. The food was incredibly delicious and flavourful. The service was excellent and fast. We had the bread for starters and it came with really delicious butter and spread to put on it, for mains we had the fillet which was quite small but surprisingly filling, the Norwegian salmon which was 10/10 I dont even k…

kloof.author: Vanessa Kabedi
kloof.text: I really enjoyed myself. Loved my birthday table setup and the service was great! Loved the music, deco 😂 yeah I will definitely go back. The food I ordered: 1. Traditional steak ( didn’t enjoy it, was tasteless) 2. Baked sweet potato 🥰🥰 wooooooh I loved this one! 3. 2 chilli prawns ( didn’t like it, wasn’t spicy enough for me) 4.

superette.author: Shaun Haskell
superette.text: Visited here recently for breakfast with some friends. Service was very friendly and reasonably quick. Food was served in good time and was delicious. Loved the breakfast sandwich that I had and would definitely have it again. The space is very open and it feels very comfortable.

superette.author: Garth Breytenbach Poormanscaviar
superette.text: Great discovery in the Woodstock exchange that bustles non-stop. Has plenty of seating for meeting, quick coffee or drink or some amazing food from brealfast/brunch type stuff, to bagels and the daily salad bar with or without various meat options. Lovely staff and great open space to work or have a catchup. Love this spot.

superette.author: Jamie Epperson Suran
superette.text: As we Ubered from our Airbnb we were a little skeptical about the place we were headed due to the neighborhood, but once we arrived we were pleasantly surprised. It’s a quaint little place with great coffee and great breakfast. The place really picked up as we were sitting here and the staff was so pleasant and helpful.

kalkfish.author: Shimil Doorgha
kalkfish.text: This spot is a fantastic find that offers exceptionally tasty meals at an extremely reasonable price point. It is clearly a local favorite, and it is easy to see why it has earned such a loyal following. The absolute standout feature here is the seafood; the fish is as fresh as it gets, prepared perfectly to highlight its quality.

kalkfish.author: Errol M
kalkfish.text: Iconic seafood restaurant, the fried snoek was fresh and delicious, prawns were good, grilled in a tasty peri peri oil. The crayfish was slightly overdone. Hake nicely battered but unfortunately lacked flavour. Be prepared for a +-30 min wait for anything grilled when busy. Cash only. Decent experience.

kalkfish.author: Rakshen Naidoo
kalkfish.text: Took my family for a lunch to Kalkys. The food and atmosphere is really amazing. We ordered the fish and chips with calamari, the crayfish and chips and prawns and chips. The highlight was definitely the prawns and the super crispy battered fish.

bootlegger.author: Ella Bakker
bootlegger.text: Had a delicious breakfast and matcha/coffee here! We had a very friendly service and good experience. Also there were some really delicious cake options.

bootlegger.author: Buyisiwe Varenzakis
bootlegger.text: Pretty cool, quaint little coffee shop right in the center of the Sea Point hustle and bustle. Wide range of products all freshly made and well displayed. Good, quick service.

bootlegger.author: Ксения Л.
bootlegger.text: This is wonderful, delicious coffee. very tasty coffee, one of the best I've had in the last couple of years. The coffee shop is cute, clean, enough seats. barista guy is rude and unfriendly there is free wifi.

ontherocks.author: Andrew Roberts
ontherocks.text: I was walking along the beach with a friend and we decided to try out "On the Rocks" as we had not visited this restaurant before. The interior is light and open with friendly staff to welcome you. I was wanting calamari, but couldn't find it on the menu.

ontherocks.author: Stephen CrCR
ontherocks.text: Aw3some view ti chill and enjoy your morning offer. Prices are reasonable. Service is great. I've been getting my morning coffee, at least 5 times a week there for over 2 years now

ontherocks.author: Kholi Tsotsotso
ontherocks.text: Literally on the rocks of the Blouberg beachfront, this place is a gem. Cosy ambiance, waves crashing outside, and sterling service that makes you feel completely taken care of. The food was delicious, fresh seafood that hits different on a cold, rainy Cape Town day. Our waiter George made the day truly exceptional.

yourstruly.author: Shane Janse van Rensburg
yourstruly.text: R60 for a cheese and salami sandwich seemed fair until it arrived at my table. Pretty disappointed. Portion size abysmal. Taste not bad, but no butter on one side and, while toasted, cheese not even melted. 15 minute waiting seems wild given how quiet it was and the finished product. Atmosphere ok.

yourstruly.author: Omar Shash
yourstruly.text: The café was amazing! The vibes were super cozy and relaxing, me and my wife really enjoyed the atmosphere! We took lots of photos there; it’s such a great spot for pictures too! The food quality was excellent and really tasty. We ordered the Club Sandwich and the Monster Sandwich, both were delicious.

yourstruly.author: Nomfanelo xulu
yourstruly.text: I’ve been to many restaurants and have never experienced anything this bad. An insect flew into my glass of wine while I was sitting there, and when my waiter informed his manager manager, I was told to either drink it anyway or order another glass and still pay for the contaminated one.

causeeffect.author: Nicola Henecke
causeeffect.text: Exceptionally disappointing experience from a long-time supporter As someone who has supported Cause Effect for years, it is genuinely disappointing to write this review. I have attended Brandy evenings, participated in the Mini Cocktail Flight Festivals, Bartender’s Table, and spent many afternoons and evenings enjoying the Cause Effect…

causeeffect.author: mina Schofield
causeeffect.text: It’s a fun spot for tourists or to take guests who are visiting Cape Town from abroad. I bought a voucher from Hyperli for cocktails and a food tasting experience at 50% off. It was great value at that discount. I doubt I would go there and pay full price.

causeeffect.author: Kirsten Joseph Savage
causeeffect.text: My friends and I had a marvelous time at Cause//Effect, we went for the Bottomless Mimosas special. It had a great atmosphere and the waitress Fifi, kept the bottomless mimosas flowing. The breakfast menu is also great. I had Sourdough French toast and maple syrup bacon 😋. It was scrumptious.

bluepeter.author: Jonathan Nel
bluepeter.text: We had a fantastic experience at Blue Peter. The food was delicious and the service was excellent. They were incredibly accommodating with our kids, happily making a few small menu tweaks and being very patient with us, which we really appreciated. A special shoutout to Obed, who was an absolute star and made us feel very welcome.

bluepeter.author: Roxy J
bluepeter.text: The Blue Peter restaurant offers breathtaking views that truly enhance the dining experience. The food is exceptional, with their wood-fired pizzas standing out as a must-try. The service is excellent, earning a perfect score of 10/10. Overall, I highly recommend this restaurant for anyone seeking a memorable meal in a stunning setting.

bluepeter.author: carmelo vitale
bluepeter.text: The Blue Peter is a fantastic spot for both drinks and food. The atmosphere is relaxed and welcoming, making it a great place to unwind and chill out. The location is lovely, adding to the overall experience, whether you’re stopping by for a quick drink or spending a longer evening there.

tablemtn.author: Greg Harris
tablemtn.text: Great hike. It was a workout, but had beautiful views throughout. Given the steep incline it was like being on a stair master machine the entire time, but doable for anyone with the willingness to break a sweat. I saw a few kids making the climb along the way, so being comfortable with heights is the only possible limitation!

tablemtn.author: Daniela Rauschl
tablemtn.text: This trail can be done as a loop or out and back. It can also be hard, especially on your knees. It's worth it but some fitness level is recommended. Uneven surface and high steps. I had no problems but I do a lot of trail running. I saw many people on the path struggling.

tablemtn.author: Bharathi Mani
tablemtn.text: This is the starting point for one of the treks that takes you up the Table top mountain. It's a straight up kind of trek with no shade. Best done earlier during the day and especially when the wind is low. The going up is quite easy but coming down is hard on your knees!! Parking is limited so get an uber here or come early.

lionshead.author: Rosandra
lionshead.text: Amazing views. Great challenge to get to the top but not hard easily doable if you have the will power and so worth it. The 1st part is easy but gets slightly challenging when starting to go up to the peak.

lionshead.author: Yaron Koren
lionshead.text: Due to flight changes, we arrived to Cape Town a day earlier than planned ,and spontaneously decided to hike Lion’s Head. The weather and visibility were perfect, making it a fantastic experience, though not an easy climb, especially for people around 70.

lionshead.author: Damian Robinson
lionshead.text: I hiked Lion’s Head for sunset late December which is peak season because of the summer and holiday period, and wanted to share my experience because many reviews raise concerns about safety. As a visitor, I was initially cautious after reading some of the comments here. In reality, the trail was extremely busy.

campsbeach.author: Jessica Ludick
campsbeach.text: I loved this beach but the could be some scammers with the chairs to rent them so just look out the beach can be awfully busy on hot days so just be known to that also wear alot of sunscreen! But overall i loved this beach it had alot to offer and the water just felt amazing i would recommend coming to this beach!

campsbeach.author: Jane Quist
campsbeach.text: It's free to enter this beach. It's lined with shops and restaurants. The sand is white and sparkly. The water is cold and blue. It's such a beautiful beach in a nice rich neighborhood. Lots of places to take pictures. The views are breathtaking. Do visit.

campsbeach.author: Phumulani Mazwabo
campsbeach.text: Camps Bay Beach is easily one of the most visually stunning urban beaches in the world, serving up a dramatic contrast between the massive, jagged Twelve Apostles mountain range and a pristine stretch of soft white sand.

boulders.author: Janine Long
boulders.text: A wonderful experience! You can watch the penguins walk around, swim and look after theirs young from the board walk. Can get really close to them. Definitely worth a visit! You need to pay the Table Mountain nature reserve to visit, but price is reasonable.

boulders.author: Wid Altalhi
boulders.text: I absolutely loved visiting Boulders Beach. Seeing the penguins walking around, swimming, and just going about their day was such a fun and memorable experience. The boardwalks give you great views without getting too close, and the whole area is clean, peaceful, and very well looked after.

boulders.author: Rogelio Bayot II
boulders.text: My favorite part of our trip! It's especially good to see penguins in their natural habitat rather on an enclosure. Definitely a must visit place. You walk on a walk way by the beach where you can watch the penguins safely.

bloubergbeach.author: Jaco Booyens
bloubergbeach.text: Blouberg Beachfront is one of those rare places where the world slows down and suddenly everything makes sense. You stand there with the ocean stretching out in front of you, and Table Mountain rises across the bay like a painting that somehow became real.

bloubergbeach.author: Milikaaa
bloubergbeach.text: Our Saturday morning walks are always beautiful at Blouberg 🥰🥰 grab a cappuccino or an ice cream on the way back. Lots to see and lovely in the winter time 💫

bloubergbeach.author: Tina Mc Cleeve
bloubergbeach.text: Bloubergstrand Beach Absolutely beautiful! Spent the weekend in Bloubergstrand and it was such a lovely experience. The beach offers one of the best views of Table Mountain, truly breathtaking. The area itself is peaceful, clean, and one of the nicest places I’ve stayed. Perfect spot for a relaxing getaway or just to soak in the scenery.

surf.author: Glacier Water Technologies
surf.text: Had my First Surf Lesson with Jake this morning, what an awesome experience, I stood up on my first wave. I highly recommend this surf shop, excellent service from every staff member and Especially Jake the instructor, who explained everything perfectly. All provided equipment was in excellent condition.

surf.author: Alina Müller
surf.text: Really nice staff! We wanted to book a lesson very spontaniously and the staff made great efforts in organizing an teacher for us within one hour. Thank you for that! Also the teacher itself was soo nice, helpful and we had so much fun. She gave the impression that she really enjoyed her work. The boards and wetsuits had a good quality.

surf.author: Brendan Maguire
surf.text: Had a great lesson with our instructor, Hope. She had plenty of useful tips and got my partner and I catching loads of waves. She gave good information about surfing in the area in general and when the best tides are for beginners. The overall service and setup in the store was very professional.

pottery.author: Roxanne Joseph
pottery.text: The Clay Hands team have created something truly special inside the incredible studio at 196! The courses are perfectly curated to suit all different levels of skill, time and creativity. There’s also such a strong sense of community with regular events at the space.

pottery.author: Ansellia Adams
pottery.text: Clay Hands is a little slice of calm in one’s busy week. The teachers are wonderful - super patient and knowledgable - and it’s great for beginners as well as experienced potters. No need to bring any equipment - just arrive and enjoy creating!

pottery.author: Lisa
pottery.text: Don't let the parking put you off!! Tash and her team at Clay Hands have created an utter gem here, a home from home for potters at all levels run with exactly the right balance of freedom and structure.

capemalay.author: sarune duplessis
capemalay.text: We had a lovely time cooking Cape Malay chicken curry. Our host was great and it felt if I was cooking in my own home. Learned a lot especially how to fold and make real samoosas, chilli bites and roti. Wonderful experience and your moneys worth...🥇 Recipes were send via a link. Thank you.

kitesurf.author: Jb boog
kitesurf.text: At High Five, I had my first experience with kitesurfing, and it was amazing. Although I didn’t complete all of my lessons because I had to leave, I gained a new hobby. The sport, the lessons, the atmosphere, and the people are all fantastic! Back home in the Netherlands, I will send my instructor Jeroen a message and book a new lesson.

kitesurf.author: Florian Amon
kitesurf.text: went kiteboarding last sunday with some very fine equipment from high five kiteschool. a place i can absolutely recommend! reserved full gear online, showed up with my IKO card, checked some terms and conditions and was handed a great kite and bar from the jacobsen project, both brand new, and a beautiful lieuwe shotgun twintip (wetsuit&h…

kitesurf.author: Erik
kitesurf.text: I had five intense but incredibly fun days with my kite instructor Timo in Blouberg. Although I was already able to ride confidently in calmer waters, the conditions on site really pushed me to my limits at first.

zeitz.author: Bran Wood
zeitz.text: A world-class attraction and an absolute must-visit for both locals and international tourists in Cape Town. Housed in the historic, repurposed Grain Silo complex, this museum is as much a work of art as the pieces it holds—the industrial architecture, specifically the cathedral-like atrium carved from the original concrete tubes, is brea…

zeitz.author: Neshem Ramsahar (Shem)
zeitz.text: The Zeitz MOCAA is a world class museum that showcases extraordinary works of art that are both awe inspiring and deeply moving. One of the highlights of my visit was learning about Gerard Sekoto through his journals and artwork.

zeitz.author: Lesego Kgatla
zeitz.text: I had a wonderful time on my birthday weekend. It was my first experience. You bring your ID and you get a ticket for FREE, on your birthday month. The staff explained all that I needed to know. I wish I had more time, cause there is alot to go through from 6 this floor to downwards. It has unique collections and displays.

biscuitmill.author: Thomas Grünberg
biscuitmill.text: Great atmosphere and always worth a visit. Good to try some local foods and find some nice shirts for men or dresses for women. The food stalls are easy to order from even when its packed. Much nicer than Oranjezicht in my opinion. Feels more local. Nice music as well, can easily spend half a day here

biscuitmill.author: Stefanie Maier
biscuitmill.text: A lovely weekend getaway with plenty of delicious food options, including many veggie and vegan choices. My personal favorites are the corn fritters, the salad stall and the flatbreads. Also the vegan baklava is a very tasty dessert. The atmosphere is vibrant and lively, making it a fun place to wander around.

biscuitmill.author: Skjc 01
biscuitmill.text: What can I say. The food and the staff were absolutely phenomenal and oh so welcoming. The food was soooooo delicious and the ambience was quiet, quaint and relaxinh. I can't wait to go back, it was such an amazing experience there. Oh, and the dessert was exceptionally good too!

aquarium.author: Daniel Mitton
aquarium.text: It took me back to my childhood when we had a proper aquarium in my hometown. My child enjoyed it so much seeing the different aquarium animals. Would suggest packing a small lunch for your toddlers if you decide to go. Place was clean and well kept. Ask at the front desk when feeding times and presentations are beforehand.

aquarium.author: I W
aquarium.text: I highly recommend the Penguin Experience! My partner and I were completely surrounded by five Rockhopper penguins and two African penguins. The staff even placed a Rockhopper penguin right on my lap, and I got to gently pet it.

aquarium.author: Nina Kleynhans
aquarium.text: Went with my friend to take advantage of the free birthday ticket and it went so smoothly. We were of course asked to present our ID’s and there was no need to book in advance which was great. Aside from that the experience was good,and we spent close to 45mins there. The staff was friendly.

constantiapicnic.author: Diane Jutzen
constantiapicnic.text: Well, I don't know where to begin! To me, Buitenverwachting is like a magical fantasy! Simply beautiful! The people, staff, food, wine. I am blown away! I feel like a child in a fairy tale. 5 stars is too little. I'd give it more.

constantiapicnic.author: Aloma Van dijk
constantiapicnic.text: Had a wonderful wine tasting and cheese platter. Really recommend. Hostes was really informative and made it a pleasant experience. Will come again

constantiapicnic.author: Janick Oriti
constantiapicnic.text: Super impressed! There are not many wine farms left where you get a good deal of quality wines at an affordable price in a pristine location! While I would have wanted to learn more about the history of the estate the wine was so good we bought two bottles for the very first time at a wine farm!

doodles.author: Roē
doodles.text: A lovely find, spacious, busy and buzzing from early morning. Heather was a great waitress/hostess and made sure we comfortable and nothing was too much effort for her, even tho we changed seating 3 times. Food and drinks was good, definitely worth a try. Beachview is a bonus.

doodles.author: Lyubomyr Marynovych
doodles.text: Good restaurant with delicious meat and amazing view. Great beer. Friendly personnel. Nice hot breakfast. Reasonable prices. But no Internet which is good and also bad.

doodles.author: YogaSlosh C
doodles.text: Doodles on Monday 2nd March for Breakfast was a highlight. We got in at 9am sharp and was blown away by the cleanliness of the place, from the windows to bathrooms to floor, it was spotless. The vibe was fresh and inviting on a sunny morning. The dirty chai was spot on, loved it. Cappuccino was just ok for me.

ons-huisie-restaurant.author: Jean-Pierre Cronje
ons-huisie-restaurant.text: Very wet and rainy day in Cape Town but the area inside around the fire was very cozy. We had the Oysters and corn bread as starters. The corn bread was fresh and hot and butter melted straight away. For main meals we had the fish & chips, fish & rice and third meal was fish & veggies. Food was delicious and fresh.

ons-huisie-restaurant.author: carmelo vitale
ons-huisie-restaurant.text: Overall, a great location. Every time we trave to cape town we end up there , we make sure to stop here and enjoy the beautiful sunset—it’s definitely one of the highlights is great for family . The food is not bad and the drinks are good as well. What makes this place even better is the relaxed atmosphere.

ons-huisie-restaurant.author: Kim Riley
ons-huisie-restaurant.text: I had a delicious Thai west coast seafood potjie — beautifully creamy, with gentle flavours and a very mild heat. It was packed with seafood and served as a generous portion. I sat outside in the sunshine with beautiful sea views, enjoying a perfect solo lunch and great service. Excellent value for money, especially for lunch.

damhuis-restaurant.author: Jacques Malan
damhuis-restaurant.text: Our first experience, and first impressions....... Always walking past and thinking what it would be like to sit down and enjoy 'something' whilst looking over the beach and all the others strolling past, was a frequent thought.

damhuis-restaurant.author: Rivonia Naidu-Hoffmeester
damhuis-restaurant.text: This is a lovely restaurant with beautiful beach views. It also has one of the nicest kids play areas. Food was inconsistent. Some food was out of this park and some okay. Portions are huge. I loved my creamy mussles with the blue cheese sauce.

damhuis-restaurant.author: wade Pretorius
damhuis-restaurant.text: Weekend done right at Damhuis Restaurant 🌊🍷 Amazing food, beautiful views, and service that made us feel right at home. Definitely one of the best spots in Melkbos! ✨ #Melkbosstrand #CapeTownEats #Foodie #BeachViews #SouthAfrica #RestaurantReview

jerrys-burger-bar-blouberg.author: erisghoul
jerrys-burger-bar-blouberg.text: My wife and I enjoyed the calamari, tenders, chips, wings and tartare dip we ordered. The margarita and mimosa cocktails were really nice but the long island felt watered down. The atmosphere is quite nice and the views from the balcony are amazing since you can clearly see Table Mountain from it.

jerrys-burger-bar-blouberg.author: Gugu _M
jerrys-burger-bar-blouberg.text: Absolutely phenomenal experience at Jerry's Burger Bar! From the moment we arrived, Dylan made us feel so welcome with his warm, friendly and accommodating service. We were seated at a table with beautiful views, which made the entire experience even more special.

jerrys-burger-bar-blouberg.author: Jade Daniels
jerrys-burger-bar-blouberg.text: Jerry's is situated in a great spot, with the view of the ocean, it's not crowded and is quite spacious. The waiters are friendly. The menu looks good, but the food wasn't great, when it came to the table it wasn't even hot. I had the Philly steak but the bun was so soggy I needed to use a knife and fork to eat my burger.

seat-restaurant.author: shaun0109
seat-restaurant.text: An excellent environment for enjoying a sunset, lunch or even breakfast. This pet friendly restaurant has an amazing view of table mountain. there is a park for kids to play on. and according to their menu, there are sometime live performers. Their unisex bathrooms were clean too. Food arrived on time.

seat-restaurant.author: marelize tarr
seat-restaurant.text: Nice Outing watching people go by, food was good, price also good! Waited a bit long but did not mind so much. Enough parking and space to walk around with nice shops.

seat-restaurant.author: Jacques du Toit
seat-restaurant.text: Amazing service. Superstay.io team had a fantastic time here for a year end round of drinks at the beach. The service was friendly, the drinks were cold and the sushi was epic. Our waiter was on point and really made sure that all our needs catered for. I highly recommend this restaurant as your next stop when visiting Eden on the bay.

petiscos.author: Rajesh Yandrathi
petiscos.text: Hands down the best food we have had in South Africa over the last 7 years 🤩🇿🇦 We ordered the Seafood Platter for 2 along with Chicken Kebabs, and wow… every bite was absolutely incredible 😍 The Portuguese flavours were rich, perfectly balanced, and the creamy sauce took everything to another level 🦐 We honestly didn’t expect this le…

petiscos.author: Yolande Van Eyssen
petiscos.text: Wowwwwwww. One word to describe everything. The food... absolutely delish and they are not shy with their portions. Service - brilliant. Our waiter was super attentive. The atmosphere .. you need to book and the place can get very full. But that's because it's so great! Look out for daily specials.

petiscos.author: Anlé Britz
petiscos.text: Rump espetada, grilled to medium-rare perfection, served with butternut, baby potatoes, and spinach - honestly skewered to impress. Dessert was a dream: Italian kisses with chocolate and caramel, plus traditional molotof - light, fluffy, and pure nostalgia.

cape-town-fish-market-bloubergstrand.author: Jade Farrell Loots
cape-town-fish-market-bloubergstrand.text: Brilliant spot to eat! It trumps any restaurant at Eden on the Bay easily. Stunning sunsets, great views and the food is the best part! Fresh, delicious, satiating and great portion sizes. Service was absolutely amazing. Quick, friendly and super efficient! The decor and aesthetics are gorgeous!

cape-town-fish-market-bloubergstrand.author: Jaco Kleynhans
cape-town-fish-market-bloubergstrand.text: Cape Town Fish Market in Bloubergstrand offers a very pleasant dining experience overall. The service was excellent – attentive, friendly, and well-paced – which immediately sets a positive tone.

cape-town-fish-market-bloubergstrand.author: Tanz
cape-town-fish-market-bloubergstrand.text: Loved this venue. Areas are well thought out and cater for couples and families. Wow, what a play area too, with two amazing child minders Belina and Sharon. Worth going back for the yummy food and venue.

ou-meul-melkbosstrand.author: Angela
ou-meul-melkbosstrand.text: I recently visited Ou Meul Bakery in Melkbosstrand again, a place I used to frequent when I lived in Grotto Bay, and unfortunately, this visit was quite disappointing. In the past, I always appreciated their menu for its quality ingredients and satisfying, well-balanced meals—especially their nourishing bowls with options like kale and ch…

ou-meul-melkbosstrand.author: Nicola Martin
ou-meul-melkbosstrand.text: The food was good and it's a lovely venue, but the service was very slow, even though it wasn't very busy when we visited. It was on our bucket list but I doubt I would go again.

ou-meul-melkbosstrand.author: Sybz Solomons
ou-meul-melkbosstrand.text: We always stop here on route up the West Coast. Great coffee, range of pastries and pies. Tried for breakfast but it ends at 11.45. Great for kids there is a large open space with green grass to play and a small play park. Pet friendly. Our doggie was greeted with a biscuit. Fresh water bowls available. Vert charming waiter.

portalia-pizzeria-deli.author: Lee-Anne Curtis-Cox
portalia-pizzeria-deli.text: I've lived in the area for 8 years now and never saw or heard of Portalia (combination of Portuguese and Italian). We had a friend performing there and were invited one Thursday evening. I didn't make a reservation, but was seated immediately, although there weren't many open tables available. The restaurant is run by family.

portalia-pizzeria-deli.author: Angela Kewney
portalia-pizzeria-deli.text: For years, Portalia Pizzeria & Deli has been one of my family weekly go-to spots and remains one of Table View’s best-kept secrets. Tucked away from the crowds, this family-run Portuguese and Italian gem has built its reputation the old-fashioned way – through passion, consistency, warm hospitality, and genuinely exceptional food.

portalia-pizzeria-deli.author: Tania Special Fiction Books
portalia-pizzeria-deli.text: Absolutely the Best Pizza in the Tableview area. The toppings are great and plentiful. I got a takeaway and even though it’s busy I waited 10 minutes. Had a nice glass of wine while I waited. Great service with a smile.

romans-pizza-milnerton.author: Nick
romans-pizza-milnerton.text: Maybe the staff from the West Coast Village Branch could come over for a play date ? Spicy Chicken Pizza 5/5👊

romans-pizza-milnerton.author: Daily Bite
romans-pizza-milnerton.text: Great pizzas and theres always tons of toppings. Never had a problem

romans-pizza-milnerton.author: YAKO TV LIVE 263
romans-pizza-milnerton.text: Used to buy my dinner there but after the poor service I experienced from the cashier who was on duty, I will never put my foot there date was 12/04/23 time 14:07 PM I wasn't able to place my order cz the lady was quite as she is dump I'm sorry Romans pizza paddocks you lost a customer and I will make sure that i tell a lot of people not…

copper-club-sandown.author: Rodley Takunda
copper-club-sandown.text: I had such a wonderful experience at the restaurant, all thanks to Tafadzwa Chinyanga. She was incredibly sweet, friendly, and professional throughout our visit. Her politeness and warm attitude made us feel so welcomed and comfortable. The service she provided was truly par excellence.

copper-club-sandown.author: Nolene JvV
copper-club-sandown.text: Since relocating from Century City to Blouberg, we are thrilled to have discovered our new go-to restaurant. Every guest we bring here is equally impressed. The food quality is consistently excellent, and the entire staff and management team are incredibly welcoming.

copper-club-sandown.author: Puseletso Jozi
copper-club-sandown.text: I enjoyed my meal at Copper Club and the service from Rutendo was wonderful. Everything was great until I noticed that the “tobacco sauce” didn’t taste right, it seemed either diluted or not the original. As someone who really enjoys tobacco sauce, this was quite disappointing.

bootlegger-sandown-retail-crossing.author: fahiema van der schyff
bootlegger-sandown-retail-crossing.text: Bootlegger Sandown consistently delivers exceptional coffee and outstanding service every single time. The staff are friendly, welcoming, and fun to interact with, which makes the whole experience even better. The atmosphere is warm, and inviting. This is the kind of place you genuinely enjoy spending time in.

bootlegger-sandown-retail-crossing.author: Feziwe Nondzaba
bootlegger-sandown-retail-crossing.text: I was so disappointed with my takeaway burger. It was almost burnt, leaving it dry and hard to eat, so mich so that I could bot finish it because it was rather chewy. I would have called the restaurant to let them know and see if I could get a refund but it was in the evening already.

bootlegger-sandown-retail-crossing.author: Peter Bothma
bootlegger-sandown-retail-crossing.text: Good day 👍I am writing this review to compliment the barista champ (forgot her name/can't spell it correctly) This young lady has been nothing but the sunshine that starts our day. My wife and I go to this branch every morning for the coffee special and I must admit... she makes the best coffees.

all-in-the-kitchen-deli.author: sphiwe Masuku
all-in-the-kitchen-deli.text: Never in my life have I had a breakfast this delicious. Every ingredient was incredibly fresh, flavourful, and perfectly balanced. What stood out the most was that you could taste each ingredient individually, without one overpowering another. It wasn't too oily, it wasn't over-seasoned or under-seasoned.

all-in-the-kitchen-deli.author: Nigel Pitt
all-in-the-kitchen-deli.text: With a time restraint imposing i decided to try the food at this venue. I placed an order via whatsapp a few days before which they confirmed. When i arrived to collect, they didnt have a record of my order. no matter. The gentleman that assisted with the order provided what i had ordered.

all-in-the-kitchen-deli.author: Alexandre Alves de Oliveira
all-in-the-kitchen-deli.text: We had Tuesday’s plat de jour: Lamb Green Bean Bredie, which as they describe on their FB page, is a love language. It’s a small place with seven tables that can sit about three people each, and two picnic tables that can sit a bigger group. When in Table View, you gotta try their food!! Loved it. They also have takeaway.

atlantic-beach-hotel-melkbosstrand.author: Gary Lilley
atlantic-beach-hotel-melkbosstrand.text: With SO much competition nowadays, you cannot afford to NOT be ontop of your game! We enjoyed Melkbos, all the lovely restuarants, the beach, the market, driving around, we attended a music festival, we stayed in, when it was storming cold...then we wanted to watch some movies, while ordering room service!

atlantic-beach-hotel-melkbosstrand.author: Charmaine - Gizelle Badenhorst
atlantic-beach-hotel-melkbosstrand.text: The first night was awful the pillows were horrible woke up to a terrible headache and the bed was even worse. They upgraded us to a lovely room with proper pillows and a proper bed. The hotel staff are friendly and accommodating. The only down fall at this hotel is that they lack a proper breakfast.

atlantic-beach-hotel-melkbosstrand.author: Rajesh Ramkawal
atlantic-beach-hotel-melkbosstrand.text: Aircon in rooms did not work, six rooms that evening. Elevator also went in the blink. Otherwise all good

the-cinnamon-club.author: Ruben Kruger
the-cinnamon-club.text: The Cinnamon Club is absolutely incredible! Not only did they deliver the most DELICIOUS salted caramel cheesecake I've ever tasted, but this team went above and beyond to assist me on very short notice. I received an immediate response and friendly service.

the-cinnamon-club.author: Amy Peens
the-cinnamon-club.text: We ordered two cakes and they were almost too stunning to eat. However, once we got over the sadness of destroying what looked like pieces of art, I was so glad we did because they were beyond delicious!! Would absolutely order from them again.

the-cinnamon-club.author: Laura
the-cinnamon-club.text: Absolutely outstanding experience! The San Sebastián cheesecake was not only unbelievably delicious, but also beautifully decorated and made with so much care. The service was exceptional – friendly, professional and incredibly accommodating.

reach-cafe.author: Regina Luders
reach-cafe.text: A beautiful garden setting, very tranquil. Ample parking too. Lovely service and nice food. They also have super quality frozen meals, at a very reasonable price. The beef lasagna I can highly recommend!

reach-cafe.author: Louisa van Niekerk
reach-cafe.text: This is one of my favorite coffee shops, because it's so peaceful and the food is really nice and fresh, but numerous times I have found their service to be very slow. You have to call the waiters to take your order and to bring the bill, even if it's not busy.

reach-cafe.author: Mark Woolfrey
reach-cafe.text: Excellent service and great food. Idyllic and peaceful setting with plenty of outside places to sit under trees and undercover. So many tasty treats and an extensive menu of food and drinks to choose from.. Also very accommodating to those with food allergies. Will 100% be back.

waves-restaurant.author: Beaulah Red
waves-restaurant.text: The ambiance was nice, clean and welcoming. I had the onion soup. It was warm and hearty but the more I ate the saltier it became. My sister loved the Parmesan soufflé. I recently learned that onion soup that was made previously and reheated again becomes salty.

waves-restaurant.author: AJ
waves-restaurant.text: I ordered a Caesar Salad, that on presentation looked really good. Alas, it was not very good. The chicken, though not much, was dry, tough and chewy and the egg was over cooked. Croutons should be light and crispy, they seemed old and stale. No fault for the service really, everyone was very hospitable.

waves-restaurant.author: Matt Matthew
waves-restaurant.text: Turned up tonight as a party of 6 wanting something a little bit special with a good view. Ordered drinks which were going down well and half an hour later food turned up. Two of us had ordered beef brisket with another ordering pork belly.

sunbird-restaurant.author: Penelope Dibate
sunbird-restaurant.text: I honestly don't know what they put in their pizza, it's the best I've ever had and I'm not easy to impress. The view is also amazing and so is the service. I love this restaurant.

sunbird-restaurant.author: Marisa Botes
sunbird-restaurant.text: What a beautiful elegant restaurant ♡ the staff is super friendly and the waitress who served our table was so cute and friendly she definitely make our evening worth while i hope when she reads this she will smile and know that she is an amazing woman ♡ unfortunately i did not write her name down.

sunbird-restaurant.author: Trevor Ayling
sunbird-restaurant.text: Best food ever. Magnificent views of the golf course, 1st tee and 18th green and to the sea and local countryside. Excellent service. Very family friendly. Must book if you want to eat outside but lots of room inside. Famous for authentic pizza from the oven and more recently sushi.

romans-pizza-west-coast-village.author: The Food Musketeer
romans-pizza-west-coast-village.text: To be honest, not really the greatest pizza. I ordered the mini peri chicken and it felt watery. Let's just say my tummy was not very happy with me for it. I still opted for the thick base hoping it would be good. #TheFoodMusketeer #TheFoodMusketeerEats #TheFoodMusketeerDrinks

romans-pizza-west-coast-village.author: Nick
romans-pizza-west-coast-village.text: Convenient store to get too , enough parking etc but comparing this particular store to my experience at the Paddocks & the Green point store , i find this particular store stingy with toppings and behind in quality . This is their spicy chicken pizza , more like spicy chicken flavour ??

romans-pizza-west-coast-village.author: Craig Goliath
romans-pizza-west-coast-village.text: We had the worst experience from this store yesterday. We sat on the beach (Blaauwberg) and decided to order pizza as the kids were hungry. Placed an online order at 16:29 with 35mins expected for delivery. Noted that we were on the beach and the driver needed to call. 17:04 no phone call regarding delivery.

melkbosskerm.author: Marlise Pietersen
melkbosskerm.text: This is an ideal place for a party or event. Lots of space with a dance floor. The food is fantastic! Lots of fish and mussels to eat and then my favorite is the baked bread and the pumpkin pie that tastes like pudding and no they do not share the recipe. They also serve braai meat and moer coffee afterwards.

melkbosskerm.author: Where To Next
melkbosskerm.text: Melkbosskerm exceeded my expectations. We attended a birthday party and it was so lovely. Cozy,rustic with the smell of seafood and potjiekos in the air. Nice big dance floor and a great venue option that is reasonably priced. You can also bring your own drinks and mix with no charge. We will be back.

melkbosskerm.author: Karel Vermeulen
melkbosskerm.text: A great farmers market woth a huge variety of food and gift items. Well prized. Great live music. Friendly relaxed atmosphere. It works like a shop as you pick all thw items you want and pay once off at the front till.

the-coffee-stop.author: Farid Ragozin
the-coffee-stop.text: Such a lovely, calm little café — with an amazing view of the ocean and Table Mountain. Peaceful vibe, perfect place to sit, relax, and just enjoy Cape Town. Highly recommend. Jessica, thank you ❤️

the-coffee-stop.author: Michael Lawley
the-coffee-stop.text: Have had a handful and a half of coffees, have to say some of the best quick coffee with a great view to have always coming back

the-coffee-stop.author: Stephen
the-coffee-stop.text: Excellent service from this small outlet on the road beside the sea. Perfect for stopping for a coffee when walking the coastal route from Eden on Big Bay all the way to Table View. Coffee is well made and sold at a very reasonable price.

caffeine-cartel-coffee-truck.author: Ruan Van Der Merwe
caffeine-cartel-coffee-truck.text: Truly amazing coffee served with a smile and attention to detail, Grant provides a wonderful atmosphere that really makes you look forward to your next cup! Caffeine Cartel is a must if you are walking the prom in Blouberg!

caffeine-cartel-coffee-truck.author: Christopher Schofield
caffeine-cartel-coffee-truck.text: Great coffee! iced coffee is my go-to, they make them so good! Especially on a hot day! They also have stamp cards, cant wait for my free coffee!

caffeine-cartel-coffee-truck.author: Alex Scott
caffeine-cartel-coffee-truck.text: Amazing Coffee, Great people, very neat & presentable coffee truck. Will only use them for the functions @ VW Table View from now on!! Thanks, Grant, for making our sale weekend great!

blowfish-restaurant.author: Daisy Lim
blowfish-restaurant.text: I travel frequently around the world and this time we are travelling between Johannesburg and Cape Town. I’m usually very careful when choosing restaurants, and I never experience any stomach issues because of that. That’s why I was very excited to visit this restaurant.

blowfish-restaurant.author: Karen Sandison
blowfish-restaurant.text: Waiter, Daniel, did a great job. We were party of 8. Food arrived timeously. Hot and delicious. Well priced, good value for money. Great view. Would recommend and we will go back again. The R300 average per person, included drinks..... good amount of alcohol for the afternoon

blowfish-restaurant.author: Tayla Carstens
blowfish-restaurant.text: It's been my second time to Blowfish, and this time around the food was really great however not entirely to my liking but nonetheless it was great. I will come back for their sushi as it's really more of their strong suits.

news-cafe-table-view.author: Peter Hendrickse
news-cafe-table-view.text: We have returned after 5 months. Menu still great. Cynthia, our Waitron , previously and again today, is the best. Pleasant, knowledgeable and informative. And also a great sense of humour. Wine prices, however, are ridiculously inflated. Wonderful location. Lovely margaritas. Tapas was great, Toasted Chicken and Avo - naise not so good.

news-cafe-table-view.author: Tianna Nleya
news-cafe-table-view.text: Outstanding seafood fresh, flavorful, and perfectly prepared. The cocktails were expertly crafted, refreshing, and well balanced. What truly stood out was the excellent service: attentive, friendly, and professional Gibbs. A complete experience from start to finish.

news-cafe-table-view.author: Pilar Johnson
news-cafe-table-view.text: Perfectly OK. Good service, nice outdoor seating and fun vibe with everyone sitting out there. Burger was bland and poor quality beef. The butternut squash and halloumi salad was pretty good.

bossa-sunningdale.author: Gabby De Wet
bossa-sunningdale.text: After a very busy day in Cape Town we decided to get dinner before heading back home to the West Coast. Walked in to Bossa which we hadn't visited before. The entire restaurant was clean, tables neatly prepared to welcome patrons. People of various ages were dining. Music was playing, not too loud.

bossa-sunningdale.author: Lizell Erasmus
bossa-sunningdale.text: It happened previously and we thought we'll give it another try but this time we were even more disappointed! We ordered via MrD and it seems that those customers means absolutely nothing.

bossa-sunningdale.author: Marisa Botes
bossa-sunningdale.text: Had the best experience today at Bossa Sunningdale it was my 1st time visiting them, and it was absolutely amazing that they will definitely see me and my family again. Our waitress Pamela was absolutely a gem she was so kind and helpful kudos to you!!

fancy-franks-sunset-beach.author: Elizabeth O'Rourke
fancy-franks-sunset-beach.text: Beautiful restaurant with easy going vibe, played easy to listen Christian music on the Sunday. The decor and vintage photo's and old telephones add to the feeling of stepping back into time but the food is just 100%. Food was delicious. Our family's first time here but won't be the last

fancy-franks-sunset-beach.author: Hermann Schultz
fancy-franks-sunset-beach.text: What a shocker. Stopped for a meal with an overseas colleague and our MD. Service is non existent whether you ask the bar staff, the chap who appears to be the manager or the wait staff walking past trying their best to ignore you We tried to phone to get someones attention but strangely the phone went unanswered The chicken wings starter…

fancy-franks-sunset-beach.author: Anlé Britz
fancy-franks-sunset-beach.text: Hello soft-shell tacos loaded with pulled beef or Mexicana chicken — messy in the best possible way and packed with flavour. The vibe is warm, vibrant, and buzzing with friends and family gathered around hearty meals and wonderfully unfiltered conversations.

the-hart.author: Angela Kewney
the-hart.text: If you’re looking for a restaurant that consistently delivers from sunrise to sunset, The Hart in Melkbosstrand is hard to beat. I’ve enjoyed breakfast, lunch, and dinner here, and every experience has been fantastic. The food is beautifully prepared, full of flavour, and served with genuine care.

the-hart.author: Alex de Bruin
the-hart.text: What a great food experience, the staff is professional and friendly and the chef really puts passion in the food. A special thanks to our waiter Alex, not only for the great service, but for his friendliness, kind demeanor and knowledge of the menu, pointing out the best dishes to choose from.

the-hart.author: shaun0109
the-hart.text: A very cozy place to spend the evening as the sun goes down. Staff is very friendly and quick to help. The food has a large variety. However, the price for their pizza was a bit much for the size and quantity. I haven't had other food, but I was a bit disappointed price wise. Taste was great. It arrived hot enough to burn my mouth.

reload-flamingo-square-centre.author: Neo Mabeta
reload-flamingo-square-centre.text: One of the best places one can ever get, service is top notch….. Lu Anne is the best 🙌🏽🫵🏽🔥🔥🔥hope she gets recognition

reload-flamingo-square-centre.author: Annemaria Wijsbroek
reload-flamingo-square-centre.text: We always receive good service in a friendly atmosphere. There is a lovely leafy outside area for smoking and pets are welcome too! Food is reasonably priced and very nice. There are lovely fresh juice options too. Highly recommend. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reload-flamingo-square-centre.author: Earl Abrahams
reload-flamingo-square-centre.text: I love trying out different café’s and restaurants for their coffees and mochas. Reload was beyond my expectations. Great atmosphere and service + value for money. Will return again.

the-brazen-head-big-bay.author: Anonymous
the-brazen-head-big-bay.text: If you want awesome delicious food, then this is your place to go! The Tato skins are absolutely amazing! Smothered in cheese, there could have been a bit more bacon, but it was still delicious. The best thing of all is, it is not greasy at all!

the-brazen-head-big-bay.author: Hattingh Melanie
the-brazen-head-big-bay.text: What a wonderful experience! Great atmosphere, very friendly and attentive staff and AMAZING food! The BEST ribs I have EVER had, literally falls off the bone, very meaty not too fatty, just perfect! I highly recommend and will definitely be back!

the-brazen-head-big-bay.author: Michelene Arendse
the-brazen-head-big-bay.text: Tato skins for the win!! I have never as in ever had this dish before! They're fried potatoes skins (not greasy), topped with bacon, 2 types of cheeses, accompanied with salsa and cream cheese. I managed to finish half of it, true value for your bucks! Chicken livers is absolutely delicious! Steak, egg & chips awesome!

melkbos-country-club.author: Brian M
melkbos-country-club.text: We used the country club facilities for a braai and were extremely impressed with the small-town hospitality the staff showed toward us. Nothing was too much trouble. The bar is also well stocked, and the prices are very competitive. The club is off the beaten path, but if you're in the area, stop in for a drink.

melkbos-country-club.author: David Botha
melkbos-country-club.text: we spend money on dop and play pool, have a good time for a while and then go outside to smoke a pipe. a fat guy comes out and starts screaming at me and my brother we busy smoking tik and drugs and he has us on camera. who does he think he is too attack us like that he wanted to hit us we werent doing anything illegal ur poes.

melkbos-country-club.author: Trevor Ayling
melkbos-country-club.text: Smoke filled American style sports bar. Friendly people,good service. Big TV running old sports events.. Cheap drinks but lots of cigarette smoke. But it's their club, their choice. Lots of outside tables so you don't have to breathe it in. Loadsa space for cars. Didn't try the food.

baked-raats.author: Brynmor Marais
baked-raats.text: My best spot in Cape Town. Feels like home, you are welcomed like a King, the food is off the chart amazing and the products along with the chilled atmosphere takes to a whole new world. Definitely a 5 star review. Thank you BAKED 👌🏼💫

baked-raats.author: Eric Pretorius
baked-raats.text: We wanted the Eggs Benedict but it was no longer available because of a menu change. They kindly prepared an excellent Benedict and informed us that it would be a covert menu option. So if you enjoy an Eggs Benedict ask for the under the counter, E&R Eggs Benni and they will oblige.

baked-raats.author: Levy
baked-raats.text: TABLE VIEW BRANCH . My friend and I decided to try the place for breakfast and I must say we were impressed with the food quality and the service . My friend had cheese croissant and I had chicken cheese tramezzini. I enjoyed the food and I can recommend the place for light breakfast .

time-out-bar.author: Calvin Cornelius
time-out-bar.text: Cozy Seats and Friendly Staff all round. Had their Burger and Chips with Onion Rings and it was absolutely delicious, added a 30 piece Chilli Cheese Puffs and damn that is amazing. Definitely a good spot that has some Pub Foods that are to die for would recommend to all and also some great drink specials.

time-out-bar.author: Sheila Randall
time-out-bar.text: Tonight was the 20th anniversary of the pub opening.. A great place to meet and greet. But seriously as a person coming in as not a local to be ignored by the bar staff while their concentration was on the locals they need to up their game. When serving drinks.

time-out-bar.author: Kyle Smit
time-out-bar.text: Very well priced, absolutely brilliant service by the bartender.

le-petit-cafe-and-bar.author: Melanie N-P
le-petit-cafe-and-bar.text: ​Lovely Flavors, but Service and Tidiness Lag Behind ​This is a cosy spot for a meal, and we really enjoyed the flavors of our breakfast. The chef is talented, though the plating looked a little sparse for the dish size. A great touch is being able to opt for a mimosa instead of coffee with your meal!

le-petit-cafe-and-bar.author: Kiki Deer
le-petit-cafe-and-bar.text: Cosy little café at Sandown Centre in Blouberg Sands. I've always wanted to pop in there after my daily shopping, and I've finally made it. There is a small but excellent selection of Portuguese dishes: For a snack, I recommend the mussels with creamy sauce. The owner is very friendly and the staff are extremely attentive and polite.

le-petit-cafe-and-bar.author: Ashley Hastie
le-petit-cafe-and-bar.text: Amazing ! This little place deserves all the hype ! From the lovely waiter who was welcoming, attentive and extremely kindhearted to their barista who prepared our drinks with care and then into the kitchen with one chef who’s passion is visible in the way he takes time and efforts to prepare each component of the meal.

misthom-lounge-shisha-bar.author: Rita Chinazom
misthom-lounge-shisha-bar.text: Perfect place to be regardless of what other people are saying here,, I went there and it was an awesome environment. Please do not be deceived by people commenting bad about someone's business out of their own carelessness, anger and too much to ask that they cannot even afford.

misthom-lounge-shisha-bar.author: Zama Matikinca
misthom-lounge-shisha-bar.text: A lady who works here was unfairly fired after drunk customers attacked her after the club was closed. The manager together with the bouncers did nothing to protect her. It deserves 0 stars.

misthom-lounge-shisha-bar.author: Athenkosi Ntoyise
misthom-lounge-shisha-bar.text: An employee was attacked and there hasn’t been any action against the perpetrators. It’s really not a place for one to go to. I would’ve given it a zero review. It’s disgusting

heritage-lounge-and-restaurant.author: console zinhle
heritage-lounge-and-restaurant.text: I had an amazing experience at Heritage Lounge. From the moment I arrived, the atmosphere was welcoming and vibrant. I really love how they celebrate South African culture through their traditional food and exciting nightlife events. The service was excellent—staff were friendly, attentive, and professional.

heritage-lounge-and-restaurant.author: Phiwe Ndlovu
heritage-lounge-and-restaurant.text: They have the best food ever,good service,good DJs ,they have heaters when you cold ,a nice balcony smoking friendly,they are always open during the day you can host any events there the space is big..l love love heritage lounge and l recommend it 100%

heritage-lounge-and-restaurant.author: Dintle Damane
heritage-lounge-and-restaurant.text: Very good experience when one want to detox and have a good time

blouberg-beachfront.author: Roxy J
blouberg-beachfront.text: Bloubergstrand, particularly the area surrounding On The Rocks Restaurant, is nothing short of enchanting. Nestled along the Atlantic coast of Cape Town, this picturesque location offers some of the most mesmerizing views of Table Mountain, making it a perfect backdrop for both leisurely strolls and memorable photographs.

blouberg-beachfront.author: Khayelihle Ngwane
blouberg-beachfront.text: Some areas are looking nice, nice area for busking under the sun or running for physical activity. If you want to have a nice stay hotels around the beach are awesome. You can book yourself an upper room and enjoy the table mountain view. I'm not sure about social events, braais and toilets or fresh tap water...

blouberg-beachfront.author: Pilar Johnson
blouberg-beachfront.text: Best view of table mountain. Not the best sand, but not too crowded. Lots of families and kids. Down the way is a great place to watch the wind surfers

blouberg-kite-surfing-beach.author: Pops Johnson
blouberg-kite-surfing-beach.text: Wow, what an amazing area. So much to do here, beach, bars, restaurants, ice cream. Besides that, it's clean, people are friendly, ample parking everywhere. Great spot for day and night activities with a bunch of mates.

blouberg-kite-surfing-beach.author: LOUIS MOOLMAN
blouberg-kite-surfing-beach.text: This is a very stale into the sea beach with a nice Milky lane just across the road. Have yourself an ice cream and watch the sunset with Tablemountain in and Robben Island im the back drop while kite surfers mesmorise you with some tricks and surfing.

blouberg-kite-surfing-beach.author: Elsie Zwennis
blouberg-kite-surfing-beach.text: My favourite place in Cape Town- Such a great place. Always vibey and filled with furry friends enjoying a morning walk, outdoor lovers getting their daily exercise and kitesurfers showing off. Add lovely weather to the mix and you have a summer's day to remember!

sunset-beach.author: Charlotte Spears
sunset-beach.text: I saw the most beautiful sunset in Cape Town, as if I was in a painting.

sunset-beach.author: Benjamin Hirsch
sunset-beach.text: Very nice beach with a view

sunset-beach.author: Garth Williams
sunset-beach.text: The best spot to take a photo of Table Mountain and my favourite walking route

big-bay-blouberg.author: Rutendo Tricily Manene
big-bay-blouberg.text: Very secured environment, beautiful beach apartments with an interior design of the sea. Perfect for a summer vacation. One of the biggest highlights is the location—just a short walk from the beach, where visitors can enjoy spectacular views of Table Mountain, breathtaking sunsets, and world-class kite surfing.

big-bay-blouberg.author: chazelle van vuuren
big-bay-blouberg.text: The Big Bay Blouberg is truly a fantastic place to stay! From the moment you arrive, the breathtaking views of the ocean and Table Mountain never fail to impress. It's the perfect setting for a peaceful and refreshing getaway.

big-bay-blouberg.author: Andre Greyling
big-bay-blouberg.text: We stayed nearby for 15 years before we moved up country. Still love to return to Big Bay when we can. Beautiful sandy beaches, stunning views and very good for activities such as cycling and running.

big-bay-beach.author: Matthew Peter Ford
big-bay-beach.text: My time at Big Bay was deeply refreshing for the soul. There is something powerful about standing where the ocean meets the horizon and being reminded how vast God’s creation is and how small our worries can become in His presence. The space invites reflection, stillness, and gratitude.

big-bay-beach.author: Harrison Godday
big-bay-beach.text: One of the best beaches capetown has to offer, I spend hrs walking this beach everyday because I love the feel, white sand, cold water and beautiful sunset view. Awesome beach and 10/10 recommended, nice restaurants around too to get some meals/snacks This beach is just therapeutic for me and gives its own form of healing

big-bay-beach.author: Belinda Meyer
big-bay-beach.text: Just stunning! Love the sound of the waves. Feel invigorated after visiting this beach.

duynefontein.author: Jonathan Taljaard
duynefontein.text: Love this stretch of beach. Nice and flat and peaceful. Great to walk your dogs too. Been going to this beach for many a year.

duynefontein.author: Natalie van Niekerk
duynefontein.text: It was a relaxing easy going day. Not 2 many people which was great

duynefontein.author: Felecite Labuschagne de Jongh
duynefontein.text: Beautiful, clean quiet beach with spectacular views

rietvlei-wetland-reserve.author: jose romeu de abreu
rietvlei-wetland-reserve.text: Affordable entrance fee, nice walk to the bird hides, took some really good pictures over many visits. Relaxing day out. Jose. South African Tour Guide, Entrepreneur, Garagiste Winemaker & Photography.

rietvlei-wetland-reserve.author: Punyar Chitnukulsiri
rietvlei-wetland-reserve.text: Open sky great view to see Table mountains and refreshing atmosphere. Many birds are here to see. But for Flamingos has to come on Summer time.

rietvlei-wetland-reserve.author: Kesh G
rietvlei-wetland-reserve.text: Visited Rietvlei for some R&R. The access staff were very friendly and helpful. The layout and atmosphere was great. The only downside was that we had to abandon our plans for some catch & release fishing. There’s a lot of grass in the water which makes reeling in the line/hook a bit of a mission.

little-bay-beach.author: Petesmyname
little-bay-beach.text: Awesome beach to watch the surfers and the sunset views are breathtaking. Seems to be a popular spot for walking dogs, surfing, kite surfing, photography or even a romantic picnic at sunset 🌅.

little-bay-beach.author: Dylan Delport
little-bay-beach.text: I stopped at Holbaai and had a great day. Beach was clean and had a nice medium sand. Not the fine Melkbosstrand sand that takes three showers to get rid of or the shelley surfice of Kreefbaai that slices your feed and need a scraper to get off. Water was a bit murky on the day, but the whole coastline was.

teal-bend-park.author: Scully Scullard
teal-bend-park.text: A nice and quiet area and playground for the kids

teal-bend-park.author: Liezel Van Greunen
teal-bend-park.text: Can't even justify it as a park! What a waste of time

table-bay-nature-reserve.author: Vernon Chalmers
table-bay-nature-reserve.text: A short hike from Woodbridge Island, opposite Milnerton High School, is the entrance to the Milnerton Lagoon section of the Table Bay Nature Reserve conservation Biodiversity Network.

table-bay-nature-reserve.author: BENJAMIN WILLIAM PEARCE
table-bay-nature-reserve.text: What an amazing place close to all the amenities...beautiful and natural environment.loads of Birdlife ,Braai Areas,Toilets and extremely clean...My hang out Place...Love it❤🌟❤

table-bay-nature-reserve.author: Manuel Da Silva
table-bay-nature-reserve.text: The Cape environment in all it's natural unspoilt beauty!! A place to reunite with mother nature!!

mission-hills-park.author: R Jul-Mac
mission-hills-park.text: This is not a public park. It is part of a secure complex. It appears on Google Maps as if it is a public facility. This is incorrect.

mission-hills-park.author: Scully Scullard
mission-hills-park.text: a nice park in the center of a well managed complex

bloubergstrand.author: Martin De Villiers
bloubergstrand.text: Lovely place, wish I could stay here. One of the best views of Table mountain

bloubergstrand.author: Johannesburg 1234
bloubergstrand.text: The Pin is in the wrong place. This is part of Cape Point Park

ster-kinekor-bayside.author: Esona Michelle
ster-kinekor-bayside.text: I had such a wonderful experience at Ster-Kinekor Bayside Cinema. The service I received from one of the staff member Lisotruly stood out. From the moment I arrived, they were friendly, professional, and very helpful.

ster-kinekor-bayside.author: Jo -Jo's BnB
ster-kinekor-bayside.text: Thank you Sonwabile for all your help, great interpersonal skills, was a pleasure to deal with you. No complaints about the cinema, well maintained.

ster-kinekor-bayside.author: Matthew Wagner
ster-kinekor-bayside.text: Pitiful and complicated experience. What they don’t tell you is that every special requires your club card FOR EACH PERSON. This means you need everyone which was 5 people in our case to sign up on the spot and to fill in each club card number individually to receive any of promotions advertised.

milky-lane-total-tableview.author: Liam Esau
milky-lane-total-tableview.text: By FAR THE BEST MILKY-LANE IN CPT!!! I have been here @ 3am,4pm & last night I was there for my Favorite and infamous Crunchie Whizzer. @ Milky lane Tableview, this is how it is served standard here. The staff are polite no matter the time of day and ensure you leave with a smile😉

milky-lane-total-tableview.author: Naomi Engelbrecht
milky-lane-total-tableview.text: Advertised as being open 24/7, however we got there shortly before 20:00, with staff advising that they are closed for the night. Machines and lights still on, however staff relayed that business is done for the day. A bit disappointing as I stop here frequently, but this is the first time I was refused service

milky-lane-total-tableview.author: Elma Du Preez
milky-lane-total-tableview.text: Milky Lane Table View is absolutely the best! We had crunchie & bar one peppermint aero whizzers there and it was divine! The staff is so friendly and helpful and make the best ice creams!

tube-wave.author: Courtney Van Wyk
tube-wave.text: Had quite a bad/rude experience. We travelled from langebaan to enjoy an afternoon walk with our family and decided to stop for ice-cream before heading back home. After reading reviews we decided to tey Tube Wave.

tube-wave.author: Pascal Hiniker
tube-wave.text: I’ve been enjoying ice cream at Tube Wave for over 20 years, and it never disappoints. The ice cream is consistently delicious, the staff are wonderfully friendly, and the setting is simply breathtaking. With seating right on Melkbosstrand beach, you can savor your treat while taking in the endless views of the Atlantic Ocean. Stunning.

tube-wave.author: Daljit Singh
tube-wave.text: We bout soft serve ice creams here. They have sugar cones, normal cones and cups. Ice cream can get additional toppings like nuts, caramel etc. They also have some general items like sweets. Small shop with nice items if you on the Melkbosstrand beach.

small-bay-park.author: Rudi Potgieter
small-bay-park.text: The best place to bring your kids. Best sunset view of Robben Island. With low tide you are a few steps away from Ons Huisie restaurant and walking distance to Blue Peter.

small-bay-park.author: Heinz Strübchen
small-bay-park.text: I just love coming here, it is away from the maim-stream beach-goers. It is secluded from the howling South Easterly. Safe for kids amd there is a play park area fpr the kids too.

small-bay-park.author: Alette Wild
small-bay-park.text: A lovely spot on the Western Coastline of Cape Town, South Africa. View the most spectacular sunsets, sandy beaches and restaurants along the beach front & beyond. Robben Island lies across the Bay.

the-bubble-hub.author: Johan van Wyk
the-bubble-hub.text: Having some free time on a hot weekday afternoon, I asked Google for some soft serve suggestions in Melkbosstrand. At The bubble hub I chose the bubble waffle which you design yourself. Important note: Do not eat anything before the time! Friendly and quic with very nice ice cream. I'll be back.

the-bubble-hub.author: Wayne N
the-bubble-hub.text: My first visit after it was recommended by a friend. Lovely, reasonably priced menu, with lots of delicious goodies to choose from. Friendly staff. I chose the fudge and cookie milkshake. Was delicious. Their cappuccinos are also very good. Their dipped ice cream cones looked worth a try. A must visit if you are in the area.

the-bubble-hub.author: Cindy Wentzel
the-bubble-hub.text: Phenomenal experience! Top class food with excellent personal service. Waffles were delicious. Chicken strips were some of the best I've ever tasted. Ribs were incredible. There was a great vibe with toys and games for the kids (and the adults!) and great music.

gatti-ice-cream-factory-shop.author: Johan Rossel
gatti-ice-cream-factory-shop.text: Good selection of sweets and ice cream. Excellent value for money

gatti-ice-cream-factory-shop.author: Trista Steininger
gatti-ice-cream-factory-shop.text: I went to buy some sweets and when i bought them i didn’t realise the price. Few days later we see they charged us R1000 for a packet of sweets and a kitkat box. Dont buy from this place. they are scammers. Boycot immediately.

gatti-ice-cream-factory-shop.author: Cayla Lötter
gatti-ice-cream-factory-shop.text: My mom bought a box of wafers, when she got home and opened it, it was old, expired and the wafer had gone rotten. She went back and they said “no refunds”. DISGUSTING. don’t ever buy from this place. My mother could have gotten very ill and they refuse to help or assist. I’m going to cal the health department on these people.

the-dairy-den-sandown-retail-crossing.author: Robin Carlton
the-dairy-den-sandown-retail-crossing.text: Wow wow wow! Visited the new Dairy Den by Checkers Hyper in Sandown and tried the Nutella bubble waffle- what a treat! The new look is super cute and fun, the place was clean, and the service was fast and fantastic. This is definitely going to become a regular stop for my son.

the-dairy-den-sandown-retail-crossing.author: Riaan van der Merwe
the-dairy-den-sandown-retail-crossing.text: @TheDairyden Sandown Retail Michelle and Phumzile, you two made Mother’s Day absolutely perfect! The service was warm and attentive from the moment we walked in, and honestly — best waffles, coffee, and doughnuts we’ve had. You went out of your way to make my mom’s day feel extra special, and it meant so much to our family.

the-dairy-den-sandown-retail-crossing.author: Cryptomind
the-dairy-den-sandown-retail-crossing.text: Worst tasting small donuts I’ve ever tasted , just don’t open the business if you don’t know about donuts, this is like tiny bits of donuts and emty inside and all you taste is pure sugar no caramel or chocolatey taste , such a waste of money , please

sempre-espresso.author: David Cristia Puig
sempre-espresso.text: I went to Sempre Espresso twice in my 4 days in Cape Town. I really recommend this please, really good coffee and very affordable. Also, the service is excellent as they are really nice and kind. Even though the coffee is with take away cups, you can drink it with nice views and also there is some space to sit next to the coffee truck.

sempre-espresso.author: Peter Neethling
sempre-espresso.text: On Blaauwberg beachfront, near Doodles. So many delicious refreshments. Costa and Debbie are a lovely couple, who take pride in their products and service. Sit down for a chat and admire the magnificent view across the bay of Table Mountain. Watching people go by is very entertaining. Wishing Sempre Espresso the best.

sempre-espresso.author: K
sempre-espresso.text: Coffee was really good. I wish they used more eco-friendly takeaway options, especially the straws which are plastic waste that can easily land up in the ocean. Hoping the owners will consider this 🤞🏼

atlantic-beach-links.author: SA CCJ
atlantic-beach-links.text: When you're paying premium weekend rates, you expect the fairways to be lush and well-manicured, not patchy or neglected. 1. The Value Gap (Price vs. Quality) * Premium Pricing: Atlantic Beach often charges a "scenery premium" because of the Table Mountain views.

atlantic-beach-links.author: Friedrich Schulz
atlantic-beach-links.text: I played this course recently with a local member as well as some foreign guests. Overall the course is a great experience, it is not long but with the wind will be a real challenge. The fairways aren’t in the best of condition, but work is underway to repair. The halfway house is great and the practice facility really good.

atlantic-beach-links.author: Etienne Snyman
atlantic-beach-links.text: Manicure not great, however it's due to water shortage and not maintenance. I played with people from UK and Germany which was nice and although I played better the second nine with more wind, I do think it can be a beast in high winds. The beer we had with local musician playing in the background was a wonderful end to a great day.

the-thursty-turtle.author: Jayden Bird
the-thursty-turtle.text: A fun spot in Blouberg, tends to attract a diverse crowd of people. Everyone is very friendly and the waitress very helpful. They do not have cocktails but their drink selection is good. Will be back.

the-thursty-turtle.author: Ross McLaren
the-thursty-turtle.text: It is what it is. Local watering hole, full of locals. Friendly and welcoming vibe. No idea if they do food, think it's just a pub. Best pub in the area.

the-thursty-turtle.author: Frank de Graaf
the-thursty-turtle.text: It is what it is. It's a dive bar with well priced drinks, full of fun and interesting locals. Staff are friendly and it's easy to get a drink from the bar. The doorman is surprisingly good at keeping the underage trouble makers out, so it has a good vibe. Definitely worth a turn if this is your scene.

isla-malie-tropical-spa-tableview.author: Sarah Costello
isla-malie-tropical-spa-tableview.text: Lovely place, lovely staff and a great Swiss massage from Ingrid. I'll be back! Next time I'd like to have my massage outside in their secluded spot, then a fresh juice at the juice bar 🍹

isla-malie-tropical-spa-tableview.author: Ashley Van
isla-malie-tropical-spa-tableview.text: Lovely experience at Isla Malie. Beautiful rooms and stunning decorations. I love the island experience, brilliant massage center. This is such Gem in Blaauwberg. Best massage I have had since arrived in the country. I have been to several massage spa in the last few weeks, sad that I only noticed this spot at the last minute.

isla-malie-tropical-spa-tableview.author: Desire Crew
isla-malie-tropical-spa-tableview.text: I took my mom for her birthday. We did a swedish full body massage. Gigi and Samantha were absolutely amazing. My mom and i left feeling relaxed and like absolute jello. Completely forgot our plans for afterwards. Will definitely be coming back. Thinking of doing a monthly visit

paintball-pyrozone.author: Thina Nelo
paintball-pyrozone.text: We had my nephews 16th birthday party at this place on the 7th of March 2026 and it was absolutely a success! The staff were not only helpful, but made us feel at home. We didn’t feel rushed or confused as everything was explained in great detail from the very beginning. Their venue is spacious, clean and well taken care of.

paintball-pyrozone.author: Saaniah Blankenberg
paintball-pyrozone.text: The facilities and staff were amazing, unfortunately the weather was not on our side but that did not stop the staff from ensuring we had a wonderful time at the venue. The staff was very friendly and super helpful. Our kids loved it, the adults lived it. It was an overall win for all ages.

paintball-pyrozone.author: Craig Mott
paintball-pyrozone.text: Awesome place. We had our son’s 13th bday here. They looked after the kids, kept them safe. Different paintball fields available. Nice shady area to chill. Had a great experience. Highly recommend

madx-muay-thai-boxing-fitness.author: Ines Rosef-Ingram
madx-muay-thai-boxing-fitness.text: Madeleine is such a great instructor! She makes training fun and pushes you just the right amount so you are left feeling that you had a good exersise and powered up for the day. Her personal touch to each client makes her classes suitable for all fitness levels!

madx-muay-thai-boxing-fitness.author: Liz Sol Tolibas
madx-muay-thai-boxing-fitness.text: Sports and fitness truly come together at Madx Muaythai Boxing and Fitness under the guidance of Coach Madeleine. As a woman on a fitness journey, I feel empowered and supported with her approach that is both structured and personalized.

madx-muay-thai-boxing-fitness.author: Ann Bester
madx-muay-thai-boxing-fitness.text: Boxing with Madeleine is great work out. I feel more confident with myself. Madeleine is an amazing coach and always compassionate about everyone situation or injury and my Boxing Day is always the highlight of my week. 💞

melkbosstrand-oppiesee-cultural-centre.author: Michelle Theys
melkbosstrand-oppiesee-cultural-centre.text: We attended a conference here and really enjoyed our stay. The accommodation was clean and tidy, though guests should note that you need to bring your own bedding and essentials. The location is beautiful, with the ocean just a short distance away — a peaceful and refreshing place to spend time.

melkbosstrand-oppiesee-cultural-centre.author: Lebogang Mogale
melkbosstrand-oppiesee-cultural-centre.text: A wonderful facility that is well suited for youth and school camps. The dormitories are comfortable, and there is a spacious hall ideal for dining as well as indoor activities. The kitchen is fully equipped with all the necessary amenities, making catering easy and convenient.

melkbosstrand-oppiesee-cultural-centre.author: Darren Yul Cupido
melkbosstrand-oppiesee-cultural-centre.text: We had a great time here. The facilities were decent and well maintained. We had some issues as the ovens in the kitchen were not working. However, the overall experience was good.

studio-46.author: Lizette Erasmus
studio-46.text: Absolutely amazing experience at Studio 46! Hettie, the owner, went above and beyond to help me with a jewelry piece, and her commitment and dedication were truly outstanding. You can immediately feel how much she cares about her clients and her work.

studio-46.author: Suzett Lawrence
studio-46.text: I needed my wedding ring adjusted and “refreshed”. I received brilliant service. Trustworthy jeweller, very competent. Pleasant experience.

studio-46.author: Sonica Symons
studio-46.text: Beautiful jewellery, friendly service and assistance. Repaired some of my broken jewellery and I've bought so many hand made pieces from them. Visit the studio each time we're on holiday in Blouberg. Worth a visit!

ohana-beauty-and-wellness-day-spa.author: Jenelee
ohana-beauty-and-wellness-day-spa.text: Excellent service received from one of the therapists (Samela) throughout my entire treatment (body scrub, full body massage & facial).Clean, luxurious setting.Friendly staff.

ohana-beauty-and-wellness-day-spa.author: Robbyn Mattei
ohana-beauty-and-wellness-day-spa.text: I booked for a bridal party of 5. The staff at Ohana were amazing and very accommodating toward everyone's individual needs. We were comfortable and enjoyed our treatments, leaving refreshed and excited for the wedding. Professional and friendly with great conversation!

ohana-beauty-and-wellness-day-spa.author: Jasmine Wong
ohana-beauty-and-wellness-day-spa.text: Stunning new spa location with a variety of services from nails, facials, sauna and steam rooms. Very relaxing ambiance with the 60 minute Swedish and the deep cleansing facial. Lots of opening specials and worth it to check out the additional sauna service. Nice products and friendly staff.

naree-authentic-thai-massage.author: Rebecca 74
naree-authentic-thai-massage.text: Prior to February 2023: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐I've been to many spa's in Cape Town but since I tried Naree, I don't go anywhere else. I'm a regular client for the past 3-4 years. The therapists are well-trained & professional. You can be assured of a good quality massage every time.

naree-authentic-thai-massage.author: Dr. Priya Buldeo, Ph.D
naree-authentic-thai-massage.text: A warm relaxing environment. You instantly feel like you've been transported to Asia when you walk through the door. The massage therapists are well-trained, professional, kind, friendly and considerate.

naree-authentic-thai-massage.author: Henk van der Watt
