drikus-horse-trails-paternoster.text: Such an unforgettable experience! Our trail guide was incredible and the horses are just lovely! Each horse has it’s is own unique personality and the trail guide does an exceptional job at matching you to a horse that suits you! Highly recommend!

equine-sport-centre-for-horse-riding-ste.author: Ashleigh Phillips
equine-sport-centre-for-horse-riding-ste.text: Highly recommend! My friend and I lease two horses to do our sunday outrides together. The trails are amazing, horses are incredible and the ESC team are so lovely and kind!

equine-sport-centre-for-horse-riding-ste.author: Tatiana Holland
equine-sport-centre-for-horse-riding-ste.text: Amazing ride. Spectacular views and kindly people make this ride unique. A place to be back for sure. Congrats Fanus, you made this ride special, a really unparalleled experience.

equine-sport-centre-for-horse-riding-ste.author: Roland Bruderer
equine-sport-centre-for-horse-riding-ste.text: We went there as a holidays birthday gift. We were welcomed super friendly. Our daughter could help make the Horse ready. During an unforgettable ride she was able to experience the lovely surroundings in multiple riding modes.

horse-rides-at-petes-wildlife-safari.author: Werner De Kock
horse-rides-at-petes-wildlife-safari.text: An amazing experience. One everyone should enjoy. Great service. Attention to safety and detail. This was our second time and we will be back again.

horse-rides-at-petes-wildlife-safari.author: Andrea Widmer
horse-rides-at-petes-wildlife-safari.text: Went there for a 2h safari guided by Deidre. We had a lovely time and saw giraffes as well as zebras amongst many others. The ranch takes care very well of their horses. Fully recommend.

horse-rides-at-petes-wildlife-safari.author: Sharon T
horse-rides-at-petes-wildlife-safari.text: We were very keen on doing a horse riding safari and this place offers just that. We made a booking via the website (we contacted them to ensure there were dates available and then make payment). We took an uber to the place which was quite a distance away from Cape Town.

oudebosch-guest-farm.author: Tino Müller
oudebosch-guest-farm.text: The accommodation and farm is stunning with breathtaking views and great attention to detail. The staff was very loving and caring. A special thanks to Linda who took us out on her horses, who are well trained and extremely well taken care of. During the ride we were taken away by the wonderful landscape and even saw a bosbok.

oudebosch-guest-farm.author: Maria
oudebosch-guest-farm.text: Thank you so much Linda & Piet! We had such a great and relaxing time at your farm. The lodges were huge and cozy, the kitchen was completely stacked with everything you need to prepare yourself a dinner (oven, stove, even an airfryer). The view was breathtaking. Sitting on the balcony drinking a coffee and waiting for the day to begin!

oudebosch-guest-farm.author: Garth Cornellissen
oudebosch-guest-farm.text: If you are looking to wind down and relax this is it. Tranquility at its best with excellent views, we took our 2 year old and she enjoyed it as much especially the beautiful pool and jacuzzi. It really is off the beaten track and a nice reset from city life. Once again thank you for a wonderful getaway.

west-coast-horse-trails.author: Zoé Gotti
west-coast-horse-trails.text: We had the most amazing trail and beach ride today with Chris. This is one of the most beautiful places to go riding. Not only for the scenery but also the carers are deeply passionate about the horses and take very good care of them. The horses are well treated and let free in their private land.

west-coast-horse-trails.author: Olha Lysak
west-coast-horse-trails.text: After a disappointing experience with a provider at Noordhoek Beach, where for a huge sum (8400 ZAR for 4 people), the guide refused even to take a photo for me and where we were unable to gallop, despite having agreed on that beforehand, we decided to try this provider based on a recommendation from my local friend.

west-coast-horse-trails.author: Danielle Willekes
west-coast-horse-trails.text: Experience was just amazing, I’ve enjoyed it so much. Horses are well taken care of and my horse was perfect for beach rides. Anthony the tour guide was super friendly. Would definetely recommend and I want to come back soon! Thanks so much.

paradise-stables-robertsvallei.author: Dana Rowe
paradise-stables-robertsvallei.text: Went for a 1.5 hour trail ride with my husband. Could not have been happier with the experience! The guide (Koos) was wonderful, horses very well trained, and the terrain and views were striking. Ride was perfectly tailored to our experience level. Would 10000% recommend for any level of rider.

paradise-stables-robertsvallei.author: Emily Duly
paradise-stables-robertsvallei.text: Did a 1 1/2 hour horse ride with my partner and had the best experience. The views were incredible and our guide was so friendly. Going through the vineyards is amazing. The horses were so well looked after, and even though we haven’t done much Horse Riding before we felt confident and both loved it.

paradise-stables-robertsvallei.author: Philip Teltz
paradise-stables-robertsvallei.text: We had an absolutely amazing experience at Paradise Stables in Franschhoek! Our guide, Jonathan, was incredible, he’s been riding since he was eight, knows every stone and corner of the area, and is a true local. His knowledge really enhanced the ride, and his kindness made the whole experience so enjoyable.

journeys-end-horseback-rides.author: Chante Erasmus
journeys-end-horseback-rides.text: We took my son of 3 years for his first horse (pony) ride ever and it was amazing. Suzelle is super friendly and very professional. My son loves horses but he was a bit apprehensive when the ride started. Suzelle immediately knew how to work with him and get him to relax and to be comfortable. She was so patient and caring towards him.

journeys-end-horseback-rides.author: Margaret Elizabeth Johnston
journeys-end-horseback-rides.text: I called early in the morning and the owner, Suzelle, was so accommodating! I had a lovely noon time ride with my guide Kano and my horse Hagrid. All in all I relaxed and just enjoyed the beautiful views...very reasonable costs too and easy to get Uber to take one if you don't have a car. highly recommend!!

journeys-end-horseback-rides.author: M. Neu
journeys-end-horseback-rides.text: I booked horseback riding with Suzelle with a group of 6 and it was amazing. She has a heart of gold and takes such good care of her animals. They are always in focus and she took all the time needed to explain to us, how we ride a horse without hurting it and us. It was a blast!

alpha-equestrian.author: Renard
alpha-equestrian.text: Loved every moment of this experience. I booked with a couple of friends (some non-horsey people and others more experienced) and the people at Alpha made sure to cater for all levels of comfort. For those who were a little more nervous they had a groom come along and for those wanting a more thrilling ride they let them canter ahead.

alpha-equestrian.author: Anna Pretorius
alpha-equestrian.text: What an awesome experience! Fantastic guides/hosts, beautiful environment and absolutely amazing ride! Will definitely book again... Absolutely worth it.

alpha-equestrian.author: Aziz Alshaya
alpha-equestrian.text: Price 230 R for 20 minutes And 550 R for 1 hour African guys was friendly the owner also was friendly the horses was very good and you can pay by cash or card no problem i hope i have more time to visit them again

garden-route-horse-trails.author: Natalie Roper
garden-route-horse-trails.text: If I could give 10*, I would. Me (34F) my husband (36M) and two children (14F & 11M) went on a trail ride today. All have no experience except my daughter. It was the most awesome morning! Lizé 🤠 (our guide) was so patient with us all and has so much knowledge of the area. We all learnt so much. My kids are begging to go back.

garden-route-horse-trails.author: Odette Watkeys
garden-route-horse-trails.text: Honestly, my best outride by FAR — and I’ve been on many! 🌟 The scenery was absolutely stunning, every moment felt like something out of a movie. I got everything I wanted from this trail ride and more. The guides were so lovely and friendly, making the whole experience feel safe, relaxed, and truly enjoyable.

garden-route-horse-trails.author: Christelle Van der walt
garden-route-horse-trails.text: The reception was warm, the guide well educated and in good control of the outride. The horses were spectacular. Well looked after and exceptionally well behaved. Also refreshing to know that no outride route is the same. If you like riding please give these two ladies a shout out they will sort you out perfectly.

boschrivier-farm.author: Holly
boschrivier-farm.text: I’ve been meaning to write this review for ages since our stay in late March, because this was such a special experience and I can’t recommend it enough! From the moment we arrived, we felt so at home and peaceful. The horses were absolutely beautiful and clearly very well cared for.

boschrivier-farm.author: S B
boschrivier-farm.text: Nicky is the best! With absolutely zero horse riding experience I had the best trail ever! She is so experienced and the horses are very well trained. Absolutely recommend and I will definitely return to this lovely place.

boschrivier-farm.author: Ulla Walmisley
boschrivier-farm.text: I go riding here with my kids each year when we are in Knysna on holiday. It's such a relaxing and happy experience. The horses are very well trained and responsive, Nicky is a wonderful guide, and the farm is beautiful. Love it.

equine-encounters-and-trail-rides.author: Alexandra Mac Gregor
equine-encounters-and-trail-rides.text: Lissa is an absolute gem of a human being and instructor. Her horses are adorably sweet, calm, and well mannered... even with children. You get the most amazing experience here starting with bonding with your horse before riding, followed by a beautiful trail ride through the forest. A better experience will be hard to find!

equine-encounters-and-trail-rides.author: Ivo Adonis
equine-encounters-and-trail-rides.text: We had such a great time with Lissa. She was really patient with kids and love the way she is with her horses. The kids enjoyed themselves and with Lissa’s approach it brought my eldest boy more confidence to ride the horse alone. Will definitely be back when I’m in the area.

equine-encounters-and-trail-rides.author: Lisa Schwarz
equine-encounters-and-trail-rides.text: Highly recommended for horse and nature lovers! Lissa is a great guide who clearly cares for all her horses as much as for her guests. The horses are in great shape and well trained. You will feel safe the entire way and have lots of fun.

west-coast-beach-rides.author: Gary Ingle
west-coast-beach-rides.text: A great experience - The horses are magnificent, in excellent condition and clearly very well cared for. I rode Marvin and my wife rode Dancer. I am not an experienced rider and I was totally comfortable. A leisurely 1 hour plus walk along the beach.

west-coast-beach-rides.author: Victoria B
west-coast-beach-rides.text: Absolutely fantastic beach ride as always! Can only recommend. Mark has years of professional experience and one can learn so so much from him. An exceptional man with lovely horses with kind demeanours. It’s important to communicate your riding abilities so the ride can be accommodated to your needs.

west-coast-beach-rides.author: Michael Riedle
west-coast-beach-rides.text: We had an absolutely wonderful private beach ride for two! From start to finish, the experience was seamless. The owner was incredibly attentive and clearly cares deeply about both the guests and the horses.

tulbagh-horse-trails.author: Robert Haupt
tulbagh-horse-trails.text: We drove out from Riebeek Kasteel so my daughter could enjoy a country outride. She was not disappointed! The guides were skilled, knew the area well and judged my daughters horsemanship well enough to know how to handle the 2 hour excursion. Maybe a little on the pricy side, but we all know how expensive horses are!

tulbagh-horse-trails.author: Cathy Suleman
tulbagh-horse-trails.text: Wow what a magnificent place. The breathtaking mountains and fresh air did it for me. Will definitely go back. The town of Tulbagh SA qis steeped in rich history and I loved my stay over at Die Kliphuis

tulbagh-horse-trails.author: David
tulbagh-horse-trails.text: Nice quiet ride on lovely Cressida who came back to the seat after a few allowed take off strides on the "gallop" track. Would have liked the ride to have been slightly longer but the scenery is stunning.

robertson-horse-adventures.author: Jessica Webster
robertson-horse-adventures.text: We thoroughly enjoyed our riding experience with Wilke! The horses were lovely - forward going and a delight to ride. We thought the scenery was beautiful as well. Would love to come back!

robertson-horse-adventures.author: Josh Jones
robertson-horse-adventures.text: We had a great time on our horse ride. They were very welcoming, the horses were well looked after, and the scenery was beautiful. It was a really fun and relaxing experience. we’d definitely recommend it to others.

robertson-horse-adventures.author: Isabella Watterson
robertson-horse-adventures.text: Such a lovely experience !! The ride was perfect, we did the walk and trot route - but also managed to squeeze in a short canter which was such fun! Great team, beautiful horses - we will be back!

hermitage-horses.author: Alina Neumann
hermitage-horses.text: I did a one hour beginner trail ride with my five year old daughter and it was a fantastic experience. She loved it so much that she did not want to leave. Debrah was wonderful. She is very kind and caring and you can really tell how much she loves the horses and how well they are treated.

hermitage-horses.author: Katherine Vasquez
hermitage-horses.text: My husband & I came to South Africa for our honeymoon, & on our stop in Swellendam, we decided to go horseback riding! Setting up an appointment with Debra was super quick & easy ! Upon arrival, we were greeted so warmly & enthusiastically by Debra!

hermitage-horses.author: Arlind Maurer
hermitage-horses.text: Riding with Debbie was a wonderful experience! We had no prior riding experience but the horses were so friendly and calm that that wasn’t a problem at all. Debbie has such a wonderful personality and is incredible knowledgeable when it comes to horses. She is a very patient instructor, and we trusted her every step of the way.

oude-molen-stables.author: Shafiah- Sarvashakti Kar
oude-molen-stables.text: Generally our experience are great. Note: whats not on Google pony rides are closed between 12noon and 2pm The website doesnt exist. The telephone number given doesn't work. Today many displeased clients who arrived with a few kids just before noon.

oude-molen-stables.author: Yumna Cornelius
oude-molen-stables.text: We loved bringing our toddlers for rides until my son developed a really bad scalp infection due to the dirty helmets. Please clean your helmets or replace them or try adding new hairnets under each helmet. Terrible

oude-molen-stables.author: Sam Mnguni
oude-molen-stables.text: The horses are currently being rehabilitated and some are a little traumatised. But they are very sweet and calm and the young girls there take good care of them by the looks of it. Bring cash, they don’t take card. Rides start from R30. Between 12 and 2pm there are no horse rides while the horses are on lunch.

adventure-horse-safaris.author: Myburgh Linde
adventure-horse-safaris.text: Adventure Horse Safaris offers a truly scenic and peaceful experience for all ages and skill levels. Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced rider, you’ll feel safe and well taken care of with the proper equipment provided. The horses are clearly well fed, healthy, and beautifully groomed – calm and happy throughout the ride.

adventure-horse-safaris.author: Charne Mostert
adventure-horse-safaris.text: What a treat! I had such a fantastic day going on a horse safari. The tour I took was an hour and I rode on the beautiful Grimbeek. Alta was very thorough in explaining what will happen on the tour and how to handle Grimbeek as I don't ride horses that often at all. I would definitely recommend this horse tour!

adventure-horse-safaris.author: Joseph Baruch
adventure-horse-safaris.text: Absolutely Fabulous!!! I can recommend Mossie and her beautiful horses to anyone. We had wonderful experience with Adventure Horse Safaris! Training, maintaining, adventures, lessons you name it!

african-horse-company-stanford.author: Johnnie
african-horse-company-stanford.text: We knew this sounded pretty special when we booked it, and boy were we proved right. Breathtaking scenery, amazing vegetation (with some pretty dystopian burnt fynbos from a recent fire) and some quality family time. It was just our little unit of 4, being guided by Randall - fairly hands-off but responsive to any questions we had.

african-horse-company-stanford.author: Salome Züst
african-horse-company-stanford.text: We had a wonderful time during our horseback ride. The horses were in very good condition .The equipment, including the riding tack, was also in excellent condition. We were well taken care of throughout the ride. The guide was very kind. I would definitely recommend it.

african-horse-company-stanford.author: Dobin Van K.
african-horse-company-stanford.text: My very first time on a horse — and it was amazing! The horses are beautiful and very calm, making it such a fun and enjoyable experience.

gansbaai-horse-riding.author: Arina Zubkova
gansbaai-horse-riding.text: An absolutely amazing experience! I loved every minute of it and would highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area. The ride was unforgettable, we crossed a river, rode through beautiful scenery, and then galloped along the beach. It was such a special and exciting experience, and the horses were fantastic.

gansbaai-horse-riding.author: Sina Baade
gansbaai-horse-riding.text: I came here 2 times, one sunset ride and one experienced beach ride and it was amazing. As someone who knows quite a lot about horses I can say that this place really cares about their horses, they get water and food after every ride and they don’t live in stables, they have big fields to run around and relax.

gansbaai-horse-riding.author: Allie Equestrian
gansbaai-horse-riding.text: This place was amazing the two ladies helping us were very nice and explained all the instructions well. It was also my first time riding western and I’m very happy for it to be here. The 2 1/2 hour drive was totally worth it because the trail was lovely and the horses were so sweet and funny especially the Percheron horse😂.

souled-out-stables.author: Joey Zaayman
souled-out-stables.text: Awesome horse riding school with a lot of dedication and patience towards riders on all levels from novice to experienced riders. They treat even the most difficult riders with the utmost respect. Your horse are also cared for with supreme dedication. They walk the extra mile and think outside of the box.

souled-out-stables.author: Tiah Beautement
souled-out-stables.text: Many people want their horse stables to be exclusive and full of glamour. The indoor lighting needs to be perfect for the next TikTok video. The walls polished so well you can see your reflection. If that’s what you want, then SOS (Souled Out Stables) is not for you.

souled-out-stables.author: Cherene Srarke
souled-out-stables.text: My daughter has been riding at Souled Out Stables for two years now, and I can’t recommend it enough! It’s truly the best place to be. The instructors are always so friendly, supportive, and genuinely invested in helping improve my daughter’s riding skills, all while ensuring she’s having fun along the way.

the-ranch-horse-trail-rides.author: Elzana Koster
the-ranch-horse-trail-rides.text: I had the most amazing experience at The Ranch! From the moment we arrived, everything was welcoming and professional. The horses were absolutely beautiful, well cared for, and so gentle to ride. You can truly see how much love and attention goes into looking after them.

the-ranch-horse-trail-rides.author: Harleigh McMurray
the-ranch-horse-trail-rides.text: Looking for the perfect place to host an unforgettable birthday party or horse-riding adventure? The ranch is absolutely amazing! They offer so many fun activities, including horse riding lesson, birthday parties, day camps, and so much more.

the-ranch-horse-trail-rides.author: Dzul Bakar
the-ranch-horse-trail-rides.text: My family and I had an incredible horse riding experience today at the Ranch Horse Trail Rides traversing the Spookfontein Wines estate. Instructor Tanya and her two lovely daughters made the day unforgettable. From the moment we arrived, their warm and friendly nature put us at ease.

the-pink-geranium-horse-riding.author: awharvard
the-pink-geranium-horse-riding.text: A recent review almost sums it up for me "Elsare is a dedicated and passionate horsewoman & the horses are kind, gentle & in great condition. The trails are beautiful & every ride is a great experience." The missing bit...

the-pink-geranium-horse-riding.author: Moira Robertson-Brown
the-pink-geranium-horse-riding.text: Absolutely brilliant! Loved it. The guides were friendly, welcoming & happy to chat about many things including the horses & the surrounding area. The horses are well cared for, the gear in good condition. The horses were willing & keen to go. We were able to trot & canter in appropriate places.

the-pink-geranium-horse-riding.author: Gary Knoetze
the-pink-geranium-horse-riding.text: Wow wow wow. What an amazing experience. Elsare and Julia were the perfect guides and the ride was fun and professional. The horses are well looked after and the scenery is incredible. Highly recommended.

two-feathers-horse-trails.author: Lisa J Spitz
two-feathers-horse-trails.text: Had 2 wonderful rides here. The scenery is stunning and yard location idyllic. Stephanie knows her horses and they are well looked after. I appreciate a stables where the welfare of the horses is a priority, and they are here.

two-feathers-horse-trails.author: Claudia Tagge
two-feathers-horse-trails.text: It was an amazing experience. Steph has so gentle and nice horses. We had a great trail together and she showed me the wonderful nature around Swellendam and some stunning views. I would 100% recommend her.

two-feathers-horse-trails.author: Claire Smith
two-feathers-horse-trails.text: I'm lost for words for how stunning this trail is. Steph is a wonderful guide on the trail and we couldn't have been happier with our ride. Africa and Tequila treated us so kindly, and I scored some cuddles with Jack at the end. The view on the trail is insane! As well as just standing by the stables and looking toward the mountains.

bainskloof-horseriding-adventures.author: Kevin Bitters
bainskloof-horseriding-adventures.text: Absolutely amazing experience with Jayne and her team of helpers. Her little helpers are mostly kids and young teens and welcome other kids of all ages on horse rides. The outride is pleasant, and easy enough for inexperienced riders, but fun and scenic enough for even more experienced horse riders.

bainskloof-horseriding-adventures.author: Adnan Duvenci
bainskloof-horseriding-adventures.text: Jane and Amy were great hosts ; had a very enjoyable ride ; very nice horses , amazing scenery and friendly chat . Thank you so much : once in a life time experience!

bainskloof-horseriding-adventures.author: Murat Golcuk
bainskloof-horseriding-adventures.text: Everything was perfect they gave us an incredible experience. I highly recommend them. Thank you for everything!

painted-horse-riding-worcester.author: Wolfgang S
painted-horse-riding-worcester.text: Very poor and unprofessional experience. We were on holidays in the region and had a riding lesson for our 5-year old agreed, which was cancelled from their end in the morning, due to sickness. Okay. Rescheduled for the next day.

painted-horse-riding-worcester.author: Zubaida Mullah
painted-horse-riding-worcester.text: What an amazing experience, beautiful horses and the scenery was absolutely breathtaking. The ladies are extremely friendly and very accommodating. Will definitely be back. Thank you!

painted-horse-riding-worcester.author: Elizabeth Tedder
painted-horse-riding-worcester.text: I have been on many trail rides with Painted Horse Riding Worcester. The trails are stunning and the horses are awesome! So well-trained and fun to ride. Christel also makes sure that you go at a pace you are comfortable with and you can just enjoy the ride!

milkwood-horse-trails.author: Naomi van der Kolff
milkwood-horse-trails.text: Absolutely love it. Sandra is always friendly, energetic and always has a story to tell. The horses are all awesome and love the attention.

milkwood-horse-trails.author: Dawie Krige
milkwood-horse-trails.text: Sandra is a star. Horses are cared for and loved. Good place and unique experience it was an amazing outride next to breede river

milkwood-horse-trails.author: Brigette Kuypers
milkwood-horse-trails.text: Wondering if this business is actually open. I tried to call and WhatsApp to book an outride for 3 and did not get a response.

winelands-horse-trails.author: Delaille Raubenheimer
winelands-horse-trails.text: One of the most memorable experiences! The horses are well trained and very loved. The trails are absolutely picturesque. We cannot wait to come back!

winelands-horse-trails.author: Rebecca Costello
winelands-horse-trails.text: Had a wonderful morning ride with Leandri and her team. The ponies are well looked after and my beginner husband was well matched with a sweet pony and we had a fun relaxed ride. Definitely book a ride here if ever in the area

winelands-horse-trails.author: Leoni Siebrits
winelands-horse-trails.text: Absolutely loved this horse trail ride at De Wetshof Wines! 🐎🍇 Riding through the vineyards and taking in the breathtaking scenery of the valley and mountains was such a special experience, seeing exactly where the wine you taste later is grown. The horses were amazing, well cared for, and a pleasure to ride.

maple-ranch-adventures.author: RGerst
maple-ranch-adventures.text: A fantastic experience! Just opened, Maple Ranch Adventures is an absolute recommendation. Great fun for young and old with e-bikes and e-quads. Sensational tours through the forest, challenging trails with great views, and a small pump track on-site. Extremely friendly staff and assistance! We will definitely be coming back here!

maple-ranch-adventures.author: Heather McClure
maple-ranch-adventures.text: Had a fantastic time on the ATVs yesterday, thoroughly enjoyed by us both. A brilliant family run business, wishing you all the best going forward.

maple-ranch-adventures.author: mary Jamieson
maple-ranch-adventures.text: The tour was great. It’s a little disappointing that we had to pay the full R650 for the 5year old that went on my ATV with me.

abbotsdale-horse-riding.author: Marlena Majaji
abbotsdale-horse-riding.text: What a phenomenal experience. Literally had the best time ever. If you are ever looking for something fun yet super relaxing and calming since you will be in nature, definitely check out Abbotsdale horse riding. Also I must say great value for money because they prices are very reasonable

abbotsdale-horse-riding.author: Soraya Taliep
abbotsdale-horse-riding.text: Truly a 10/10 experience. The team was well equipped, the horses are beautiful and very well taken care of. I would highly recommend!

abbotsdale-horse-riding.author: Sarah Taliep Weeder
abbotsdale-horse-riding.text: It was my first time horse riding but but zara the crew made me feel so safe and well prepared. 10/10 Best experience ever.

sandboarding-cape-town.author: Stephanie Cliff
sandboarding-cape-town.text: We went with Luke and Elohim from Ultimate Sand Boarding Cape Town for our first sand boarding experience, and we loved every minute of it! My boys aged 10 & 12 were in their element! 2 hours flew by! The drive into the dunes with Luke was very special and exhilarating! You need to hang on for a wild ride!

sandboarding-cape-town.author: Louisa Langa
sandboarding-cape-town.text: Beautiful experience it was.to instructions on how to ride, there is a guider who rides with you and you just follow. Beautiful place for pictures as well. There is a place to get refreshments. Its unfortunate you have to pay for permits to enter the place and make bookings are not necessarily but i think one should just to be safe.

sandboarding-cape-town.author: James Northover
sandboarding-cape-town.text: My wife, kids and myself went sandboarding with Luke and Elohim earlier this month and it was absolutely awesome! These guys really do pay attention to detail, top class! Thank you so much guys, we will be back!

dragon-dune-sandboarding.author: Magda Schwarz
dragon-dune-sandboarding.text: Thanks Leon & team for an unforgettable day & experience. Family time well spent. Money well spent. We all loved and enjoyed every moment of this unique outing. We will be talking about this day for a long time. We'll organized, safety first and lots of fun! Thanks from the Schwarz family

dragon-dune-sandboarding.author: Dean Oberholzer
dragon-dune-sandboarding.text: Always an awesome experience! This was our second time here and will come back again. Leon is very knowledgeable and makes the trip really fun. Beautiful scenery and great opportunity to capture stunning action photos.

dragon-dune-sandboarding.author: Doreen Gordon
dragon-dune-sandboarding.text: Leon made the experience an amazingly fun and safe one. He was incredibly helpful,helping us with videos and photos, and it is such a fun experience. Honestly caters for all who are up for it. It is really worth it and I would highly recommend this activity.

bettys-bay-sandboarding.author: Cindy Norton
bettys-bay-sandboarding.text: Bring a board with waxed bottom! Or use cobra wax on a cardboard box. So much fun! Small dunes for fun and big trek up to the top dune for those serious... Wait for a dry day...

bettys-bay-sandboarding.author: Houston Matthews
bettys-bay-sandboarding.text: Awesome place super fun activity for the whole family

tsitsikamma-canopy-tours.author: Emily The dreamer
tsitsikamma-canopy-tours.text: We walked to the suspension bridge. Beautiful breathtaking views. We did not do the zip line or kayaking. Its still worth visiting for the views. Lovely experience. It would be difficult for anyone with bad knees or who has a hard time climbing stairs.

tsitsikamma-canopy-tours.author: Akshay Bhammer
tsitsikamma-canopy-tours.text: "The greatest adventures are not just about the places we visit, but about the connections we make and the moments that take our breath away. The thrill of linger in hearts- An absolute must-do! The management and guides at Tsitsikamma Canopy Tour are professional, safety-conscious, and incredibly welcoming.

tsitsikamma-canopy-tours.author: Adele Duvenage
tsitsikamma-canopy-tours.text: An unforgettable adventure! The Tsitsikamma Canopy Tour was pure fun from start to finish. The guides were friendly, professional, and made everyone feel safe. Zipping between giant Yellowwood trees high above the forest was absolutely breathtaking. Everything was well-organised, safety-focused, and eco-friendly.

mossel-bay-zipline.author: Omar Shash
mossel-bay-zipline.text: The view there was absolutely beautiful! Overall, the experience was fair — not as adrenaline-pumping as I expected, it felt more relaxing than challenging, but honestly I didn’t mind that at all. The staff were super helpful and friendly, and the whole setup felt very safe — no risks whatsoever.

mossel-bay-zipline.author: Lima
mossel-bay-zipline.text: It was nice … they take you by the bus up the hill then you slide down to the first spot .. it’s so safe and the staff were nice and kind If the wind is high they will not allow you to go up depending on your weight … if you are over 90 kg you can go alone and if you are below 55 kg you will slide with a guard ..if you are in between you…

mossel-bay-zipline.author: Rajesh Yandrathi
mossel-bay-zipline.text: Thrilling and fun! 🌄🪂 The ziplines offer amazing views of the coastline and mountains. Staff are friendly and safety is top-notch. A must-do adventure for adrenaline seekers and nature lovers alike

zipline-tsitsikamma-falls-adventure.author: Geert De Decker
zipline-tsitsikamma-falls-adventure.text: A fantastic experience in the spectacular gorge with many waterfalls and pools. The return walk back to the start is made very easy along a wooden walkway. The upkeep of the area needs a little later attention though. Plastic water bottles left in the fynbos alongside the walkway should be removed.

zipline-tsitsikamma-falls-adventure.author: Diala AlGhamdi
zipline-tsitsikamma-falls-adventure.text: We had the most wonderful experience! The team was very supportive, friendly, and professional, which made the whole adventure even better. The zipline itself was so exciting, with breathtaking views over the river and beautiful scenery all around. The staff also captured amazing photos and videos for us, which we’ll always treasure.

zipline-tsitsikamma-falls-adventure.author: Andrew Hack
zipline-tsitsikamma-falls-adventure.text: One of the best ziplines I have done. Views are amazing and the guides are super cool. Take the photo option its well worth it. 8 lines, not to fast and not extremely high, so a great option if its your first zipline adventure. Great for kids.

cape-canopy-tour.author: Lisa Hofmeyr
cape-canopy-tour.text: We had a really great time! There is really no need to be afraid. Our guides were amazing and absolutely hilarious. They absolutely made the best of it and made me feel so comfortable. Our guides were Destiny and a new guide on his first day.

cape-canopy-tour.author: Conrad Coetzee
cape-canopy-tour.text: This was an really good experience. The staff was very friendly, knowledgeable about the area and great at calming your nerves. Adrenaline rush with great views. Keep in mind this will cost a pretty penny. Is it worth it? Yes. You can't get the amount of ziplines for a better deal somewhere else to my knowledge.

cape-canopy-tour.author: Allene Van Den Berg
cape-canopy-tour.text: My favourite birthday activity for the past 5 or 6 years! 🎊 Always have fun zipping and die on the hike back. Totally worth it! 💜🙏

cape-town-ziplines-sa-forest-adventures.author: Warren Cowdy
cape-town-ziplines-sa-forest-adventures.text: I had an absolutely incredible experience with Cape Town Ziplines! The booking process was seamless—we booked and paid the same morning with zero hassles. We arrived on time, were harnessed up quickly, and headed straight out.

cape-town-ziplines-sa-forest-adventures.author: Debra Waldhart
cape-town-ziplines-sa-forest-adventures.text: The staff are amazing, our guides Mesili and Zuma were absolutely phenomenal & patient as this was my first time ziplining (not to mention a fear of heights). The scenery is beautiful and I am so grateful to have had the experience! Highly recommend!!!

cape-town-ziplines-sa-forest-adventures.author: Mila Mila
cape-town-ziplines-sa-forest-adventures.text: We had a great zipline experience! Everything was well organized, the views were beautiful, and the team explained and demonstrated everything clearly, which made us feel very safe and comfortable. A huge plus was that they had a special mount for action cameras on the helmet, which made it super easy to record the experience hands-free.

ceres-zipline-adventures.author: Taz Heuvel
ceres-zipline-adventures.text: This was amazing. Thumbs up to Dylan he was awesome as a instructor. Guys Ceres Ziplining is the place to go to.if I could I would rate them 10 ⭐

ceres-zipline-adventures.author: Anne Siegler
ceres-zipline-adventures.text: Best Best Zipline I have ever done. Flying through the mountains with amazing guides. We felt safe, welcomed and had a lot of fun. Thanks to Rachel and Xavier 🤩

ceres-zipline-adventures.author: Katyra Rodrigues
ceres-zipline-adventures.text: Loved the experience, all the staff was awesome from the first person to the last .

knysna-ziplines.author: Dan Ohana
knysna-ziplines.text: ​We enjoyed our experience at Knysna Ziplines very much! The views are absolutely stunning, offering a unique and breathtaking perspective of the landscape. ​A huge special thanks to Lloyd and Aya. They were fantastic—highly professional, which made us feel safe, yet also incredibly funny and friendly.

knysna-ziplines.author: Andrew Hack
knysna-ziplines.text: This was an amazing experience. Guides were awesome, friendly and top notch safety. The lines were super fast and freaking high, with the best views ever. A must for any adventure seeker. A bucket list item.

knysna-ziplines.author: Amber Van Wyk
knysna-ziplines.text: What a thrilling experience, especially while on our honeymoon. We were so impressed by all the staff, from the kind lady at reception to our guides Nigel and Lukas. They really made us feel comfortable and gave us such a good laugh. The view was amazing and we are happy that we have overcome our fear of heights.

cango-caves-zipline-estate.author: Tilana Mostert
cango-caves-zipline-estate.text: Cango Caves brought me right back to my school days, seeing the stalactites, stalagmites, and magnificent columns in real life. The sparkling selenites were like stepping into a natural history lesson underground.

cango-caves-zipline-estate.author: Pieter du Preez
cango-caves-zipline-estate.text: This should be part of one bucketlist when visiting the Karoo! Make the effort and whilst driving there enjoy the natural scenery! The guides are very knowledgeable and their typical South African humour is top notch! My wife normally suffers from anxiety but she aced this!

cango-caves-zipline-estate.author: A L
cango-caves-zipline-estate.text: Well located close to Cango Caves. We were looking for a place to get lunch and this hit the spot! Ordered the ostrich burger and Bobatie which was exactly what we needed! Pete was very helpful getting us in and helped us order as we weren’t so familiar with the menu. Thank you team!

acrobranch-garden-route.author: Amber Van Wyk
acrobranch-garden-route.text: We had such an incredible experience. It definitely challenged us, but that’s what made it so rewarding. Being outdoors and fully immersed in the activity was refreshing and unforgettable. A special thank you to Jacques, our guide, who made the entire experience even more enjoyable.

acrobranch-garden-route.author: Stoffel du toit
acrobranch-garden-route.text: The Acrotwigs is a really awesome experience for young children. The guide was very friendly and helpful. Kids really enjoyed it.

acrobranch-garden-route.author: Raghad Fahad
acrobranch-garden-route.text: It was a wonderful experience and a new adventure in every sense of the word. I thank Elgin for her patience with me; I was extremely scared. She was by my side the whole time, never frowning or abandoning me. I am incredibly grateful to her. thank you Eljean

ziplines-in-plett.author: Vladimir Azov
ziplines-in-plett.text: Professional team, exciting experience. Altogether 6 zip lines over the valley. If you are just one in the group, it will take less than an hour.

ziplines-in-plett.author: Paul Screen
ziplines-in-plett.text: We visited slightly out of season although from the initial contacts being made through to meeting Robert & Brenda our experience was nothing short of amazing!! We had a 10 year old with us and the smile on his face said it all, just brilliant. Thank you for a great time.

ziplines-in-plett.author: Meggan Manson
ziplines-in-plett.text: We took a chance and called because we missed the online booking and found that Joshua was extremely accommodating. He even referred us to Ice Dream Land for the most Devine pizza ( all the bells and whistles). The Zip Lines were awesome and Rob was great with our children.

marine-dynamics-shark-tours-shark-cage-d.author: Dan Wellard
marine-dynamics-shark-tours-shark-cage-d.text: From the moment we arrived, the Marine Dynamics team made us feel genuinely welcome - friendly, passionate, and incredibly knowledgeable about what they do. This isn’t just a shark dive company; they’re a serious conservation organisation fighting to protect sharks and African penguins from extinction, and that purpose runs through everyt…

marine-dynamics-shark-tours-shark-cage-d.author: Miriam Triguero
marine-dynamics-shark-tours-shark-cage-d.text: Amazing experience. We booked the shark cage diving and we added a last minute upgrade to swim with seals. Best decision ever. We were lucky to have nice weather conditions, we could see some sharks and dolphins. Then we started our second activity with the seals and it was absolutely stunning.

marine-dynamics-shark-tours-shark-cage-d.author: Jeremy Thomas
marine-dynamics-shark-tours-shark-cage-d.text: Amazing. From start to fi ish it was awesome. Great boat, great staff, great equipment. Whales, sharks, rays, penguins and fur seals. We'd come back any time given the opportunity.

prodive-scuba-diving-centre-plettenberg-.author: Geoff Muckle
prodive-scuba-diving-centre-plettenberg-.text: Fantastic wee with the ProDive crew. Very professional and knowledgeable, and most importantly for me, they were great with my kids. The diving with the seals was a highlight. Would definitely recommend.

prodive-scuba-diving-centre-plettenberg-.author: wenzi zhaojuan
prodive-scuba-diving-centre-plettenberg-.text: Swimming with seals in the Indian Ocean is definitely one of the best family-friendly outdoor activities along the Garden Route. My 6-year-old son in the water with me, while 4-year-old daughter stayed on the boat with the skipper and had a wonderful time as well. All the staff were kind and patient with the children.

prodive-scuba-diving-centre-plettenberg-.author: Ellen Tharp
prodive-scuba-diving-centre-plettenberg-.text: Amazing seal diving! So cool swimming with them and seeing them below the water. Everyone was so kind and helpful (my second real time diving), especially JC! Shirley and Ollie were also great, and Michael was an awesome skipper :)

the-shark-lab-mini-aquarium.author: Kim Erasmus
the-shark-lab-mini-aquarium.text: Cute little aquarium, several unique species of fish. R40 per person to enter. There is a small tank where you can take a swim with small sharks (extra cost). The place is unfortunately run down and dilapidated, not extremely well maintained, tanks are quite small for the creatures that they do have, it's a bit sad to see from those persp…

the-shark-lab-mini-aquarium.author: Rochelle Fortier
the-shark-lab-mini-aquarium.text: After paying, the lady at reception told us that there are no sharks in the tank after I told her that we're just there to show the sharks to our kids. We then proceeded to have a look at the variety of fishes. There were more fresh water fishes -(the type you get at the local petshop) than seawater creatures.

the-shark-lab-mini-aquarium.author: Carla De waal
the-shark-lab-mini-aquarium.text: Overall inexpensive small trip you pay R40 so you get what you pay for. Animal seem well kept staff is very nice but there is room for improvement.

apex-shark-expeditions-great-white-shark.author: Mirella Y.
apex-shark-expeditions-great-white-shark.text: I would like to sincerely thank the team for the memorable day they gave us. It started with the warm welcome upon our arrival! I was pleasantly surprised by the attentive service and comfort throughout the day.

apex-shark-expeditions-great-white-shark.author: Sab B
apex-shark-expeditions-great-white-shark.text: The best shark diving experience someone could ask for. The guides were knowledgable and had eagle eyes for spotting things in the water. We were lucky enough to witness a rare sighting of 2 whales (not in season), a big group of dolphins, bronze whaler sharks, and seals! On board they provided chips, chocolates and rooibos tea.

apex-shark-expeditions-great-white-shark.author: Trisha Casey
apex-shark-expeditions-great-white-shark.text: absolutely amazing company and tour The shark cage was unbelievable we had 12/13 sharks all around us, saw a pod of 2000 dolphins, a whale and seal island. crew was outstanding and friendly our land guide took us around Cape Town and was very knowledgeable and informative very nice local man.

white-shark-africa.author: Porter's Pest Control Ltd Mark Porter
white-shark-africa.text: Our last day in S.A & we arranged to save the best until last. Early comms via WhatsApp was very clear, paid on arrival & headed out. Was informed that the previous outing in the morning (9am) had seen sharks. Within 15 mins of being out on our tour ( 11am ) several Great Whites seen.

white-shark-africa.author: Demetruis Breet
white-shark-africa.text: I had an absolutely amazing experience with Great White Africa. From start to finish, their service was incredibly professional, and the team made sure everyone felt safe and well-informed at all times. The crew was friendly, knowledgeable, and clearly passionate about what they do.

white-shark-africa.author: amelie hendrikx
white-shark-africa.text: Since my childhood I dreamed of seeing a great white shark up close. This team made it possible for me and on top of that it was a very warm, cozy, informative trip. In addition to the great white sharks, we also got to see copper sharks! Both the captain and his crew are very experienced and driven in what they do.

shark-divers.author: Johan Boylan
shark-divers.text: My Shark cage diving was hands-down one of the most incredible experiences of my life. The team was highly professional, safety-focused and genuinely passionate about shark conservation. Seeing these powerful animals up close was humbling and exhilarating. I felt completely safe the entire time and learned so much.

shark-divers.author: Alex Hoyt
shark-divers.text: We had an incredible time on this tour. Janeen made it easy to book and was clearly communicating the plans for us. The skipper Ron and Alan the guide were nice, knowledgeable and made sure we were happy! We were able to see several sharks and get some good up close viewing.

shark-divers.author: Jesse Mitchell
shark-divers.text: Hands down, one of the best experiences I’ve had this far. From the booking to the cage, the team was amazing in terms communication and logistics. I was well informed. The team on the day , from the food to cage, was great, and an absolute delight. Would definitely recommend for a bucket list activity.

garden-route-scuba.author: Lizca Kruger
garden-route-scuba.text: What a wonderful experience at Garden Route Padi Scuba centre. I've been wanting to do my open water dive course for 3 years and managed to do so now. Christiaan was a wonderful dive instructor. So thorough and patient and a delight to dive with. Reel vd Merwe - what a superstar.

garden-route-scuba.author: kirsten putziger
garden-route-scuba.text: What an incredible experience. Five stars truly do not seem sufficient to reflect the level of professionalism and excellence demonstrated by this team. I began feeling quite nervous, but that quickly turned into complete confidence and enjoyment. Every moment was exceptional.

garden-route-scuba.author: Bunny Hugger
garden-route-scuba.text: The most amazing experience filled with Educated , Caring and Passionate instructors!! By far the best place to further your skills and be included in a wonderful family along with making unforgettable memories

oceans-africa.author: Celeste
oceans-africa.text: We had an absolutely epic boat trip from Simon's Town with Oceans Africa! Graeme made us feel comfortable and safe throughout the journey, even in the windy conditions. We got up close to the lighthouse, explored beautiful Smitswinkel Bay, sea caves and kelp forests, and saw seals, cormorants and penguins along the way.

oceans-africa.author: dario nanni
oceans-africa.text: Dolphins and seals everywhere! With a very respectful approach, we could get close to them and even swim with them. They are very playful animals. Our captain was very competent, And give us a good lesson in marine biology and geology. Also, we could tell he deeply enjoyed his job! I would absolutely recommend this experience

oceans-africa.author: Kylie Brumwell
oceans-africa.text: We had an absolutely fantastic experience on the water with Graeme from Oceans Africa! His expert local knowledge meant we had the best experience possible. I would highly recommend seeing the Cape Peninsula from the water….provides such a unique and beautiful perspective on this spectacular coastline.

just-africa-scuba-center-watersports-sho.author: Lindy Penderis
just-africa-scuba-center-watersports-sho.text: I arrived from California to the Strand area to do my Open Water Course. I had the amazing pleasure of working with Mari as my instructor who was so incredible with training our group of 3 people. Mari is easy to learn from, very friendly, and incredibly knowledgeable about all skills related to diving.

just-africa-scuba-center-watersports-sho.author: Benjamin Grobbelaar
just-africa-scuba-center-watersports-sho.text: Had an amazing time doing my PADI Open Water Diver course with Just Africa Scuba. The pool sessions are fun and in a beautiful hotel. The ocean dives were mesmerizing. The owner and instructor were helpful, informative, patient and professional throughout the course.

just-africa-scuba-center-watersports-sho.author: S. Bratkovski
just-africa-scuba-center-watersports-sho.text: I did two dives in March '26 with Just Africa Scuba. A rafting boat (which was a fun by itself) brought us to two different diving spots. First was a kelb forrest with rich underwater vegetation, the second was a reef with a lot of marine life. I'd do it again!

sharklady-adventures-hermanus.author: Morgan Sampson
sharklady-adventures-hermanus.text: Been on three tours over a 15 year span and it has always been a great experience. TOP Service and experience in the field of shark cage diving

sharklady-adventures-hermanus.author: mark potts
sharklady-adventures-hermanus.text: Had an absolutely amazing trip with Shark lady adventures. The whole experience was seamless and friendly and safety was top priority. We saw so many sharks and had an amazing day. The food prepared was also a fantastic touch and hats off to the cook for a delicious soup!

sharklady-adventures-hermanus.author: Laura
sharklady-adventures-hermanus.text: Great morning spent seeing loads of sharks! Breakfast was good & the briefing made fun & informative. We were the 2nd boat out and hadn't even got our wetsuits on before the sharks arrived! It was great to see so many of them up close & personal. The trip was made better by the friendly & knowledgable staff.

cape-town-surf-school-bianca-surf-academ.author: janine van vuuren
cape-town-surf-school-bianca-surf-academ.text: Josh had an awesome first surf experience. The instructors were patient and encouraging. Will definitely go back for more

cape-town-surf-school-bianca-surf-academ.author: kyle delaney
cape-town-surf-school-bianca-surf-academ.text: What an amazing experience. Irvin was an amazing instructor. Took his time showing the girls what to do and what especially what not to do. They managed to catch quite a few waves and their confidence grew. Thank you Cape Town surf school we will be booking more sessions that’s for sure!!!!

cape-town-surf-school-bianca-surf-academ.author: Nicole Acosta
cape-town-surf-school-bianca-surf-academ.text: So awesome!!!! Coach Mike, Becky, and Josh are THE BESTTTTTTTTT! We all stood up eventually and they were so helpful

soft-surf-school.author: Talia V
soft-surf-school.text: There’s a reason Bennett only has 5-star ratings. If I could give 10 stars, I would! We both arrived early, which immediately showed his professionalism and punctuality. He came prepared with hot water for warming up booties (I brought my own) and cleaning wetsuits afterwards.

soft-surf-school.author: Hugo Morrissey
soft-surf-school.text: Bennett was great vibes. I’d been getting frustrated surfing recently so I needed a bit of a refresher and some tips which Bennett was super helpful with. Most enjoyable surf I’d had for many years! Would recommend to anyone

soft-surf-school.author: Leslie Jamison
soft-surf-school.text: Surfing with Bennett in Muisenberg was amazing fun and one of the highlights of my trip to South Africa. He was very attentive to my skill level and age (72!) and got me on some fun waves. What a great day!

stoked-surf-south-africa.author: Slaughter House
stoked-surf-south-africa.text: Great guided surf session with Stoked! On a trip of a life time to South Africa, we so fortunately contracted with Stoked for a full day guided session for my 27 year old surfer son. I, my wife and my son’s wife were ride alongs. What a great way to see another side of Cape Town!

stoked-surf-south-africa.author: Annina Jonasch
stoked-surf-south-africa.text: I had the most amazing first surfing experience with Stoked School of Surf! It was my very first time on a board, and I couldn’t have asked for a better introduction. We booked a private lesson together—my partner had already been there for the third time, which made me even more excited to try it myself.

stoked-surf-south-africa.author: Jimmy Napolitano
stoked-surf-south-africa.text: We had an awesome private surf lesson with Michelle at Muizenberg Beach. From the moment we arrived, I knew we were in good hands - Michelle seemed to know everyone! She had a warm, confident energy that immediately made us feel welcome and comfortable. As the owner, it’s clear she pours her heart into what she does.

hermanus-surf-school.author: Roos
hermanus-surf-school.text: Amazing place! Beautiful & cosy house. Host Ryan is really relaxed and helpful. Surfing teacher Chris also very caring and positive. Thanks for the great stay both of you.

hermanus-surf-school.author: Fien De beer
hermanus-surf-school.text: Very patient and calm instructors and always reminds you to have fun and enjoy surfing first. During the session, I felt like I really grew and made good progress. Good boards and wetsuits are included in the price. Can highly recommend a private session! Thanks guys, see you soon for the next waves! 🌊 ❤️1

hermanus-surf-school.author: Xander De Bruin
hermanus-surf-school.text: We went there to rent boards and wetsuits, the lady helping us was Paula, what and amazing experience we had and she was so friendly and she helped us so good whenever we struggled Would definitely recommend to go to their surf school or whenever you need a surfboard and wetsuit

cape-sports-center-kitesurfing-wingfoili.author: D M
cape-sports-center-kitesurfing-wingfoili.text: Hello, I had a private lesson today and I just wanted to say that I had an amazing time. I really enjoyed the lesson and my coach did an excellent job — unfortunately, I forgot his name. I would love to leave a 5-star review on Google and mention him by name if you could please let me know who my instructor was.

cape-sports-center-kitesurfing-wingfoili.author: Nibret Mohammed
cape-sports-center-kitesurfing-wingfoili.text: Me and my friend rented kitesurfing full gears for a week and we had great experiences with all team, everyone was helpful and they have great equipments. Definitely recommend cape sports center.

cape-sports-center-kitesurfing-wingfoili.author: Maloe Sniekers
cape-sports-center-kitesurfing-wingfoili.text: I had an absolutely amazing experience at Cape Sports Centre! I took windsurfing lessons with Justin and improved so much in just four days. Justin is an incredible instructor: extremely patient, explains everything in a very clear and motivating way, and always gives the best tips that truly help you progress.

cape-point-surf-yoga-camp.author: Alena
cape-point-surf-yoga-camp.text: An amazing place with amazing people. The best part of my trip to Cape Town. The camp is located in a quiet and very secluded area. A lot of shared space to relax, read a book, sunbathe or just enjoy the view. Owners, volunteers, surf coaches and the guests are just wonderful people.

cape-point-surf-yoga-camp.author: Jonas
cape-point-surf-yoga-camp.text: Everything was perfect; the food, the views, and the overall vibe. It’s truly an experience you will never forget. The atmosphere is very relaxed, and the people are incredibly friendly. At the same time, everything is well organized and runs smoothly, which makes the whole stay even more enjoyable.

cape-point-surf-yoga-camp.author: Aisie Maire
cape-point-surf-yoga-camp.text: Amazing experience! The coaches are all so funny and knowledgeable about how to become a better surfer from ultimate beginners to those with much more experience. The food was plentiful and delicious, the camp was gorgeous, and the hot tub helped sore muscles after long surf days. Everyone was so much fun- I’d go back in a heartbeat.

surfends-surf-school.author: Angelina Arquint
surfends-surf-school.text: We had a fantastic time with Surfends Surf School. Martyn took us out twice to surf the point break at Vic Bay. As well as having a lot of fun and chatting about all sorts of things, we felt well taken care of and he made sure we had a rewarding experience. It was great to witness his coaching talent first-hand!

surfends-surf-school.author: Marzanne Kriel
surfends-surf-school.text: Had so much fun!! Tip : take the three day option and get in to the motion of the ocean.🐬 Gilmore was a great coach and mentor; his love for the Creation and sport is contagious and he is very committed to share this for eager learners. Do not worry about your age to start surfing - this ‘tannie’ of 47 had a great time. Surf's Up!!

surfends-surf-school.author: Louise Ried
surfends-surf-school.text: Our kids (9 and 11) stating learning to surf with Surfends last summer and loved it so much they have done two surf camps this summer already!! The coaches are great, the lessons and camps are fun and the kids come away with the ability to surf within days! Highly recommend!

kitesurfing-school-constantly-kiting.author: Simun Kodzoman
kitesurfing-school-constantly-kiting.text: I had the pleasure of taking lessons at Constantly Kiting School in Langebaan again this year, and I couldn’t have asked for a better experience. Bianca was my instructor, and she’s amazing. She’s super chill, patient, and really knows how to break things down in a way that makes it click.

kitesurfing-school-constantly-kiting.author: Harvey Scriven
kitesurfing-school-constantly-kiting.text: I’ve used these guys for years to learn kitesurfing and they’re honestly amazing. Wesley, the owner, is super friendly, and the whole team is professional, welcoming, and flexible. Dudley and Timber were my instructors and both were absolutely brilliant.

kitesurfing-school-constantly-kiting.author: Michiel Hickey
kitesurfing-school-constantly-kiting.text: I had an excellent experience learning to kite surf with Dudley from Constantly Kiting in Langebaan. In just three hours of lessons, he took me from having zero time on the board to achieving a successful water start and riding for quite some distance.

vibe-surf-school.author: Kim Twiname
vibe-surf-school.text: Rigert and the Vibe Surf School team made the experience so great. He was in constant contact before the lesson to ensure we had the best waves for beginners. The lesson was amazing with easy to follow instructions, and constant support & guidance that both my 6 year old nephew and I were able to stand up and ride a wave within the first…

vibe-surf-school.author: G.H
vibe-surf-school.text: Had a two hour private session booked with Steven which was sick, got standing and riding a few waves in no time. Learned heaps about technique as well as what to look out for when spotting waves… have a good amount of things to takeaway and focus on to develop further. The booking process was smooth too, very professional.

vibe-surf-school.author: Nadine Paul
vibe-surf-school.text: I had my very first surf lesson with Steven at Victoria Bay in Wilderness. I can highly recommend this surf school. At the beginning you get a little instruction on land and then you go into the water and practise in the white wash.

son-surf-school.author: Mike & Brittnie Little
son-surf-school.text: Son Surf School in Strand is an excellent place to learn surfing! The instructors are professional, patient, and highly skilled, making it easy for beginners to feel confident on the waves. Equipment is well maintained, and the location on the wide, gentle beaches of Strand is perfect for learning.

son-surf-school.author: Constant Kannenberg
son-surf-school.text: Absolutely excellent, the coaches are patient and always there to help and guide. The team here is fantastic

son-surf-school.author: Elmarie Nel
son-surf-school.text: They deserve 10 stars!!! Amazing coaches and team!(Marcelle was so patient with my daughter) Will definitely be back!! Thank you so much!

wilderness-surf-school.author: Nathalie Biebl
wilderness-surf-school.text: We had so much fun during our lesson with Adin. Thanks to Adin I managed to get back into surfing after many years of not being on a board and having the time of my life. Not only is he great teacher and quickly finds improvements he is also such a fun, friendly and helpful person!

wilderness-surf-school.author: Ninnotix
wilderness-surf-school.text: My two siblings and I had a surfing lesson with Adin as complete beginners and managed to surf by the end. He made it so fun to learn even when we failed and gave so many useful tips and corrections. I can’t recommend it enough!

wilderness-surf-school.author: Jelmer Post
wilderness-surf-school.text: We had a great surflesson today, lots of fun in the water and very useful tips & tricks. Both for beginner level als more experienced. Clear communication of what could be expected, also before the lesson. Would certainly recommend!

k-i-s-s-keep-it-simple-surf.author: CRAIG DE LA REY
k-i-s-s-keep-it-simple-surf.text: Such a great store. Volker and his family are extremely nice people and they run a great business. They will look after you really well, and they are priced well, especially on bodyboard gear. Hope that they stock more and more pro level bodyboarding gear as time goes on because I love supporting good people.

k-i-s-s-keep-it-simple-surf.author: Simone Potgieter
k-i-s-s-keep-it-simple-surf.text: I bought something off their online store and the whole experience was great from start to end. I made a mistake with my order and they calmly and friendly helped me with everything, super fast reply’s and my order came the next day during peak December season. Super impressed and happy with the service !

k-i-s-s-keep-it-simple-surf.author: connor
k-i-s-s-keep-it-simple-surf.text: My go to for local surf kmowledge, Volker is a local legend. Its a premium surf shop where I found the higher quality and more sort out goods than anywhere else in Cape Town and SA. Hard to walk out of there without spending money… its also nice they seem to keep up with the newest fashion in the surf realm.

surfs-up-mossel-bay.author: J BR
surfs-up-mossel-bay.text: We arrived in Mossel Bay on a whim and were warmly welcomed by Doretta at Surf’s Up. Within an hour she had arranged everything – quick, easy and super-friendly. Our daughter was determined to surf only with Doretta, and it turned out to be the perfect choice.

surfs-up-mossel-bay.author: Jackeline Mostert
surfs-up-mossel-bay.text: We took our 3 children - 7, 9 and 12yo to Surf’s Up as a Christmas gift. The kids loved it so much they booked 2 extra sessions for themselves. The coaches and admin staff are all super friendly and all 3 of my children are going home able to surf.

surfs-up-mossel-bay.author: Elsje Van Eeden
surfs-up-mossel-bay.text: We had such a wonderful time with Surf’s Up Mossel Bay! The lesson was smooth and enjoyable from start to finish. The instructor was so kind and professional, making us feel comfortable and confident in the water.

cape-town-surfing.author: Luhan Bruwer
cape-town-surfing.text: CapeTownSurfing – Truly amazing service! I ordered a surfboard from CapeTownSurfing even though I live in Namibia, and the whole experience was excellent from start to finish. The team was super helpful throughout the process — they kept me updated on everything and went out of their way to make sure everything went smoothly.

cape-town-surfing.author: Paul Hayes
cape-town-surfing.text: Arrived around 11:15 to look at wetsuits and enquire about lessons. The gate was closed with no bell. I went to the side where a staff member was making coffee and asked to come in. He told me to wait, and I ended up standing in the sun while he finished a long coffee order.

cape-town-surfing.author: Jacob Vestergård
cape-town-surfing.text: Unfortunately not a good experience. Kayaking Hout Bay was a thing I really looked forward to. Went by the shop two days earlier to talk to them and make sure it was possible. No problem. But when I arrived they (different guy) suddenly didn’t have single kayaks.

east-side-surf-school.author: Herman Smit
east-side-surf-school.text: Big thanks to the crew for an epic experience! My daughter absolutely loved it and I was greatly encouraged by how fast she picked it up. The coaches have such a great way with the kids and are really good at transferring the basic skills. My daughter is hooked on surfing! 🤙🏄‍♀️

east-side-surf-school.author: Alisha Scott
east-side-surf-school.text: My son had the best time! I would highly recommend this surf school if you are interested in surf lessons or even a private lesson. He learned so much while doing what he loves and I could walk on the beach and grab a coffee knowing he is in good hand! A great gift idea too! Thank you East Side Surf School. We will be back!!

east-side-surf-school.author: Dinah Steyn Nel
east-side-surf-school.text: I highly recommend East Side Surf School in Stilbaai! The young, enthusiastic team taught my daughter the basics of surfing with patience and encouragement. She had a fantastic time learning to paddle and catch her first wave. If you're looking for a great place for your child to learn surfing, this is it!

c-kite-langebaan.author: Frank S.
c-kite-langebaan.text: Best kiteschool in Langebaan! Had an amazing time — Louis and Logan are super experienced, professional, and great fun to be around. I rented most of my gear from them and had an unforgettable time thanks to their help. Huge thanks, guys — hope to see you soon!

c-kite-langebaan.author: mark
c-kite-langebaan.text: Excellent school! Quick and good communication via whatsapp. Logan is an amazing and patient teacher. He gives clear instructions and knows when to push you. Landed my first frontrolls because of him🤙🏻

c-kite-langebaan.author: Generic Name
c-kite-langebaan.text: We went in several times to rent a canoe and they told us the wind was too dangerous. They told us to come back in the morning. We tried 4 different days and there was almost a perfect kayaking weather with no kite surfers and they refused to rent to to us. We finally found someone on the beach that said it's not a problem to kayak.

learn-to-surf-plett.author: Anne-Marie Lowe
learn-to-surf-plett.text: I totally enjoyed my 2h lesson with this school. Easy to book (did it the night before), great gear and Daniel was a terrific instructor: listening to what I was looking for and adapting to my intermediate level. I would not have had half of the fun if I would have gone by myself. Good tips and good mood! I absolutely recommend.

learn-to-surf-plett.author: Catie Close
learn-to-surf-plett.text: Visited in the off season to rent boards and wetsuits, we’d phoned ahead to arrange a time but there was no-one there when we arrived, though after calling he came about 10 mins later. Suits and boards okay, well worn but to be expected for rentals, however there was barely any wax on the boards and we were told he didn’t have any more.

learn-to-surf-plett.author: Cheryl Willard
learn-to-surf-plett.text: Brandon is an amazing instructor!! Just do it. Our 8 year old twins had the BEST morning and were up and surfing in no time. Brandon also got my husband up too….no small feat for this 45 year old land locked Canadian!!!!

buffs-surf-school.author: Lauren Feuchter
buffs-surf-school.text: We had a great surf course with Max. He explained everything very simply and comprehensibly. We felt very safe the whole time. It worked out great and we had a lot of fun! Many thanks again and also to his colleague Maya! Both were super nice and brought us into great waves. We’ve had an amazing time!

buffs-surf-school.author: Leonie Heun
buffs-surf-school.text: I would most definitely recommend a lesson at Buff’s Surf School. We were completely new to surfing, but Max explained everything perfectly. He was really kind, patient and professional, so it was easy for us to learn. The location was beautiful and had great waves.

buffs-surf-school.author: Softy Fyer
buffs-surf-school.text: Very nice lesson. Max (the teacher) was auch a nice guy and explained everything very understandable to my brother and me. Tysm

yzerfontein-surf.author: Garry Oldfield
yzerfontein-surf.text: What an amazing little surf store. Owner and son are just awesome, down to earth people. You’ll find costumes, slops/plakkies, Hey Dudes, jerseys, wet suits, surf boards AND good coffee!

yzerfontein-surf.author: Anel Strauss van Rooyen
yzerfontein-surf.text: Best surfshop EVER!!!!! Lovely people, lekker coffee! ☕️

yzerfontein-surf.author: Giel
yzerfontein-surf.text: Such nice people and good choice of boards and wetsuits, thanks for the good service

surf-lessons-hermanus.author: Sarah Siebert
surf-lessons-hermanus.text: Matthew and his dad were super nice and helpful, he answered quickly and everything worked out perfectly. We had a lot of fun and can totally recommend!

surf-lessons-hermanus.author: Valeria Talian
surf-lessons-hermanus.text: Matthew is a highly skilled surf instructor and is super fun at the same time.He is very professional, punctual and has excellent people skills. I would highly recommend his surf lessons.

surf-lessons-hermanus.author: Davey Nel
surf-lessons-hermanus.text: Highly recommend this service. The instructor (Matt) is very professional, and had me surfing like a pro after only 2 lessons!

a-k-a-w-cape-town-surf-kite-camps.author: stefni muller
a-k-a-w-cape-town-surf-kite-camps.text: Not only is the West Coast the most special part of our South African coast but you get to experience it alongside passionate ocean loving locals of the area. A better experience of an authentic part of the coast you won't find. Surfing, kiting and living at it's best !!!

a-k-a-w-cape-town-surf-kite-camps.author: Natan Lukmish
a-k-a-w-cape-town-surf-kite-camps.text: To play in the oceans of South Africa is to go all in..to get the highest experience of surfing, traveling and lifestyle. The crew of A K A W is local and most professional, they will take care of all your needs and worries. So much fun. !!Most recommended And the prices is great

a-k-a-w-cape-town-surf-kite-camps.author: Tal Satya
a-k-a-w-cape-town-surf-kite-camps.text: Couldn't ask for a better place to fall in love with surfing for the first time, than in Big Bay. with the best crew that will look after you and will show you the best spots in Cape Town I am definitely looking forward to be back to this spot with this guys (-:

saldanha-surf-sanctuary-extreme-abilitie.author: Wentzel Barnard
saldanha-surf-sanctuary-extreme-abilitie.text: Dries . A person taking charge of an unfortenate life changing experience and improving his life as disabled and others thereafter with limited support via surfing. Doen so voort Dries en Albert

saldanha-surf-sanctuary-extreme-abilitie.author: Malan de Kock
saldanha-surf-sanctuary-extreme-abilitie.text: Albert - "Ek like brood" , Dries and Krewe ... possibly the most breathtaking sight on the West Coast Peninsula! Absolute legends just grinding out their vision in relentless conditions. Passion, good vibes, lots of stoke and drive. GO KREWE GO!!!

saldanha-surf-sanctuary-extreme-abilitie.author: Bloodhound Diver
saldanha-surf-sanctuary-extreme-abilitie.text: I am really inspired by the motivation of Albert and Dries and I really believe in there cause to teach people to surf and find there inner pieces no matter who you are or what your background is or was , they are really inspirational

robbies-surfing-lessons.author: Hendrick Locke
robbies-surfing-lessons.text: What a Legend!, My son had an absolute blast! What a fantastic teacher, so easy to communicate with and an absolute passion for the ocean and surfing. I highly recommend him as a surfing instructor. Robbie! Johann sends his regards, see ya soon mate!!👊🏻😎👍🏻

robbies-surfing-lessons.author: Daniel M
robbies-surfing-lessons.text: Outstanding surfing teacher. Knows the conditions, knows the spots, and works patiently in the waves with surfers of every age and every level. Caught more waves with him in two lessons than the rest of the season ... a zen master of surfing.

robbies-surfing-lessons.author: Leonardo Caranti
robbies-surfing-lessons.text: Robbie in an amazing surf teacher. I asked him to come out during a very windy day, and it was amazing. Surfing in the southern most beach in Africa, completely alone, just me and Robbie.

west-coast-surf-school.author: Cliff Stewart
west-coast-surf-school.text: Mike is an excellent coach. Both kids have learned so much from him, our daughter in the intermediate group and son in high performance coaching. Over the past couple of years, his guidance has taken them to a level where they now compete in surfing competitions. Highly recommend West Coast Surf School!

west-coast-surf-school.author: Tanya Maia
west-coast-surf-school.text: Michael is a great coach, very friendly and super good with kids. Affordable prices. My son has done 2 holiday camps and his party with west coast surf school. I have also signed him up for surf lessons. His learning, having fun and always excited to go.

west-coast-surf-school.author: Jacqueline Smit
west-coast-surf-school.text: The holiday club was amazing. My son loved it so much he asked for private lessons as well. Michael and his dad are wonderful with the kids and very organised and professional. Will definitely be booking for the next holidays and a birthday party next year.

mav-surf-school.author: Chase McMaster
mav-surf-school.text: Had a great experience with Mav's Surf School. He's really kind and knows what he's doing. Will be sure to come back now that I got the skills. Thanks Mav! 😎👍🏼

mav-surf-school.author: Lauren bester
mav-surf-school.text: Maverick is a kind gentle soul with so much patience. Awesome guy

mav-surf-school.author: Alida Breytenbach
mav-surf-school.text: We are friends on Facebook. Love your quotes and prayers 🙏🏼 everyday
